college_info.intro:
DY Patil University School of Management's popular programme is the MBA. The school offers MBA in Marketing, Finance, Human Resources, Operation Management, Banking & Insurance, Business Analytics, and others. DY Patil Mumbai offers quality education to students under the guidance of expert teachers.
Overall, DY Patil University School of Management is one of the best colleges present in India. The school is ranked 35th by the Times and 93rd by the Business Today. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by DY Patil University School of Management and their respective eligibility:

placements.overview: Dr DY Patil University's School of Management (DYPUSM) placements 2024 have not been released. The highest package offered during DY Patil Mumbai MBA placement 2023 stood at INR 10.04 LPA. The average package ranged between INR 6 LPA and INR 7 LPA. The top recruiters are Accenture, Deloitte, Airtel, Sony, Capgemini, Jio, Adani Group, ICICI Bank, Pfizer, ONGC, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Finance - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Nice college definitely recommended.

review_content.Placements: I do not know about the highest and the lowest, but students have got nice jobs in some nice companies. My batchmates, most of them, have got placements. Some of them got great packages, while some got like the average package, but they are all satisfied.
review_content.Infrastructure: The canteen is recently renovated, and the food quality is amazing, according to the price. The service is good too, I used to get food quickly so that I can also eat between my lectures, and also the behavior of the staff is great and they are friendly, and the taste is good too.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued(Sept 2025)- MBA in Marketing Management - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good facilities, amazing infrastructure, and knowledgeable staff.

review_content.Placements: The highest package offered by this college is 18 LPA and the lowest is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Tata, Reliance and EY. Most students get placed as Sales Executives, Sales Managers or Marketing Heads. The college has a higher reach than expected which allows for networking communication and connections with industry professionals.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college has top-notch facilities and infrastructure like no other. The food quality and hygiene in the canteen are good and the prices are reasonable. There are medical facilities on campus for emergencies. The college also has its own sports complex so students can spend their time productively.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Marketing - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the faculty, average infrastructure and very poor placements.

review_content.Placements: There are a total of 280 students in the BBA batch. With almost 120 choosing the marketing honors. The highest package for BBA graduates is barely 5 LPA. And the average package for BBA revolves around 3-4 lpa. There's no major company recruiting in this college. Just some local businesses who recruit from our college. Our college does not provide any internships at all.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classroom has a projector and digital board, along with a blackboard. It also has ACs and fans in the classrooms. There is a library on campus and a computer lab (in which the majority computers don't work). The canteen is nice, and the food service is also good. There are no medical facilities and no grounds for playing sports as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in International Business - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: My opinion for this amazing college.

review_content.Placements: Students scoring above 50% can apply for a BBA course; in the 2nd year, they offer a few internships that are suitable for your field and also train you for the same. The placement is given in big MNC companies as well as normal companies, wherever you get selected for your role.
review_content.Infrastructure: Amazing infrastructure of the whole campus, beautiful ambiance and vibe in class, cafeteria service also available, every year a few amazing events to take a break from the daily routine of studies, and not to forget, they have really nice foods and quantities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued(Sept 2025)- BBA in Hospital Administration - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The university is best for BBA Hospital Administration students.

review_content.Placements: The average package at D Y Patil University for BBA HA students will be approximately 15k-20k. Good hospitals in Mumbai and Navi Mumbai come for placements. Internships are provided by the university itself. Roles such as operation executive, quality executive, and marketing roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not that good as space is small, but the overall classroom sizes are good, and libraries are equipped with good resources and books. The quality of food in the canteen is average, and other activities like sports and games are frequently organized.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued(Sept 2025)- MBA in Finance Management - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Review of DY Patil University School of Management.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell helps throughout to help you get placed in various opportunities in banks, start-ups, a few corporate companies, and government agencies, and taxation companies roles like associate, management trainee, analyst, etc. are offered. The highest package was around 5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel living space is good; we do have washing machines for laundry service, good and hygienic food, and shared room facilities. There is limited scope for sports and medical facilities. The department is good to go, and classrooms are comfortable spaces, and labs are also there.

admission_overview.college_name: DY Patil University School of Management Admission 2025 (Open): MBA Fee, Last date to apply, Application, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: DY Patil University School of Management Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: DY Patil University School of Management, Mumbai admission 2025 is primarily entrance-based; however, merit-based admissions are also offered depending on the course. Also known as DYPUSM, the institute offers courses at the undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. These courses include BBA, MBA, Business Analytics, PhD, Certificate and Value Added courses. The application process commences online via the official website of the institute. The institute offers its programmes in Aviation, Engineering, Science, Medicine & Health Science, etc. Popular courses offered by the university are MBA and BBA. Read on to know more about DY Patil University School of Management course admissions 2025.

eligibility_selection.title: DY Patil University School of Management Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: DY Patil University School of Management course admission is subject to the fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. The college offers courses in the fields of Aviation, Engineering, Science, Medicine & Health Science, etc, in full-time mode. Students seeking admission must meet the course-specific eligibility and selection conditions. The institute shortlists candidates based on either the institute-level test or scores obtained in any of the national/ state-level exams, such as CAT/ MAT, etc. The table below carries the eligibility and selection criteria for DY Patil University School of Management courses: Courses

courses_table.eligibility: Graduation with a minimum of 50% marks in any discipline or equivalent from a recognised university
courses_table.selection_criteria: Merit/ DYPCET/ CAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ MH CET + GDPI + Work Experience and Extra Curricular Activities

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with 45% aggregate from a recognised board
Postgraduation with a minimum aggregate of 55% from a recognised university
Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 45% from a recognised board

faqs.answer: DY Patil University School of Management admissions are mainly entrance-based. Students seeking to enrol into any of the courses offered at the institute need to ensure that they qualify for the desired programme before starting the application process. The institute accepts scores obtained in national-level exams, such as CAT/  MAT, etc., or in state-level exam: MAH CET.
faqs.question: Are DY Patil University School of Management admissions merit or entrance-based?

faqs.answer: D.Y. Patil University Navi Mumbai is the part of DYPUSM in which you can apply in BBA and MBA course directly by filling online application and pay the fees for the same. There will be an interview which is the part of addmission process. The details of all admission process is available on the official website and the eligibility criteria is to have a graduation degree with minimum 50 percent marks.
faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in School of Management D.Y. Patil University Navi Mumbai?

faqs.answer: The minimum cutoff percentiles for MBA admissions have not yet been released by the DY Patil University School of Management. Usually, cutoffs are announced closer to the dates of admission.However, based on previous years' cutoff trends, here are some indicative percentiles that can set as targets:CAT Cutoffs:- General Category: 60 to 65 percentile- Reserved Categories: 55 to 60 percentileCMAT Cutoffs:- General Category: 80+ percentile- Reserved Categories: 65+ percentile

admission_process.title: DY Patil University School of Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online for the preferred course. Aspirants have to register and then fill out the application form. The application fee is non-refundable and can be paid via any of the online payment modes.

The institute considers merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam for BBA. For MBA, the institute considers scores in MAH MBA CET, CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT or GMAT. Candidates selected for MBA have further to pass the GDPI round conducted by the institute.
Once the selection process is over, the institute releases a merit list. Selected students need to pay theDYPUSM feesto confirm their seat in the institute.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Information Technology Lab

reviews.review_heading: Nice college definitely recommended.
reviews.review_text: The canteen is recently renovated, and the food quality is amazing, according to the price. The service is good too, I used to get food quickly so that I can also eat between my lectures, and also the behavior of the staff is great and they are friendly, and the taste is good too.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities, amazing infrastructure, and knowledgeable staff.
reviews.review_text: This college has top-notch facilities and infrastructure like no other. The food quality and hygiene in the canteen are good and the prices are reasonable. There are medical facilities on campus for emergencies. The college also has its own sports complex so students can spend their time productively.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty, average infrastructure and very poor placements.
reviews.review_text: The classroom has a projector and digital board, along with a blackboard. It also has ACs and fans in the classrooms. There is a library on campus and a computer lab (in which the majority computers don't work). The canteen is nice, and the food service is also good. There are no medical facilities and no grounds for playing sports as well.

reviews.review_heading: My opinion for this amazing college.
reviews.review_text: Amazing infrastructure of the whole campus, beautiful ambiance and vibe in class, cafeteria service also available, every year a few amazing events to take a break from the daily routine of studies, and not to forget, they have really nice foods and quantities.

reviews.review_heading: The university is best for BBA Hospital Administration students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not that good as space is small, but the overall classroom sizes are good, and libraries are equipped with good resources and books. The quality of food in the canteen is average, and other activities like sports and games are frequently organized.

reviews.review_heading: Review of DY Patil University School of Management.
reviews.review_text: The hostel living space is good; we do have washing machines for laundry service, good and hygienic food, and shared room facilities. There is limited scope for sports and medical facilities. The department is good to go, and classrooms are comfortable spaces, and labs are also there.

reviews.review_heading: Really well developed infrastructure, faculty members and events.
reviews.review_text: As we enter the college, we can see a beautifully developed college canteen, and the food that they offer is really delicious. Moving upstairs to the second floor, we have our college library and computer lab, which are really helpful in our studies and guidance. Furthermore, on the 4th and 5th floors, we have our classrooms, each comprising air conditioning and projectors, helping us understand our subjects better. Additionally, we have a medical aid room and a sports room. The college hosts re...

reviews.review_heading: I am enjoying my college life in this campus and participating in all the events .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, lifts are all working, and teachers are very helpful; they make sure that everyone understands the topic. All topics are covered twice in the same lecture. They also support us in working in our own way. The IT lab is well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: BBA is not worth and not recommended.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is average and the campus is like a school. Amenities provided in our college are average. The cafeteria is of medium size. Most of the classrooms have air-conditioners but they don't work.

reviews.review_heading: Review of School of Management, D.Y. Patil University.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't have a hostel but the hostels that are available nearby the college have a student-friendly atmosphere and rooms. They allot a student in a room and is affordable. Girls and boys have separate hostels. Many students from different places come to study at our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college with various MBA programs which focus on making students industry-ready.
reviews.review_text: All necessary facilities are available here. Students get high-speed Wi-Fi. The canteen facility is available for students. Labs provide additional help to students in their studies. The library facility is available with a number of books for all management courses.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for MBA to gain industry backed knowledge and experience.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good. There are big classrooms, I. T labs, Canteen, Sports room, Cultural room, Auditorium and a big stadium of D. Y. Patil which encourages students to participate in various sports events. Hostel facilities is also available for students who lives outstation.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but did not satisfied with infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: The course content is built very nicely a student from any field ie Science commerce or arts can get easily through it college also has a good library equipped with modern computer facilities you get nice classrooms equipped with projector and AC .

reviews.review_heading: My overall experience for college was good.
reviews.review_text: College is not so huge but still it is good all the facilities are available which students needs, all the necessary equipment are present in IT lab and in library. All the books are update you can easily get the books related to your subjects, canteen food is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: The best thing about the college is faculty members.
reviews.review_text: We have fully Wi-Fi enabled college, the canteen was okay. The college is haven for athletes and sports-persons, since the college has top class amenities for sports. You get a big library and good computer lab as well. The classrooms are equipped with ACs.

The M.E. students are taught technical skills so that the students can become better Engineers. faqs.answer: A:    No, direct admission is not valid at Imperial College of Engineering and Research (ICOER). Admission to all the UG & PG courses at the institute is entrance-based. faqs.question: Can I join Imperial College of Engineering directly?

faqs.answer: A:    The hostel service is provided to girls only at ICOER and the fees is INR 35,000 per year, with facilities such as WIFI, 24x7 water supply, daily news paper, solar water supply, daily cleanling, etc.For boys, you can find accomadation outside the campus for around 50k per year including mess, with similar facilities.
faqs.question: What is the hostel fees at Imperial College of Engineering and Research?

faqs.answer: A:    There is no caste based seat reservation in ICOER, you get admission in the basis of your CRL in JEE Mains and MHCET. however inside the college you can get scholariship or fee waiver based on your castem i.e. for 1 year your tution fees is going to be:For open category: 1,18,000.For OBC category: 56,664.For others: 10,000.

admission_overview.college_name: Imperial College of Engineering and Research Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: Imperial College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Imperial College of Engineering and Research (ICOER) admissions are completelyentrance-based. Candidates are offered admission toBTech, MTech and MBAprogrammes under the affiliation ofSPPU. Imperial College of Engineering admissions are granted based on scores of various national-level entrance exams such asJEE Main, GATE, MAT, CAT, etc., for respective candidates. However, Maharashtra domicile candidates can also get admission to BTech and MBA programmes via a valid score of state-levelMHT CET and MAH MBA CET, respectively. The final seat allotment for all the courses at theImperial College of Engineering and Researchis done throughDTE Counsellingprocess. Read on the following article to know more about ICOER admissions 2025:

Admissions at Imperial College of Engineering is entrance-based for allUG & PG coursesin the stream of Management andEngineering. Candidates need to fulfil the basic eligibility criteria as per the course requirement. Tabulated below are the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria for Imperial College of Engineering course admission 2025:

Imperial College of Engineering feeis a sum of various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually. Check below the total tuition fee for Imperial College of Engineering courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Imperial College of Engineering seat intake varies course-wise. Candidates are offered seats based on their merit. Once the seat is allotted, candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. Below is the intake for top Imperial College of Engineering courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Imperial College of Engineering admissions are completely entrance-based. Candidates must go through a multi-level process to secure a seat at ICOER. Find below the detailed steps for the Imperial College of Engineering admission process:
Step 1: ICOER Application Process
Candidates willing to be admitted to any of the UG or PG courses must apply on the official website of the institute for their desired programme. The application form is filled in an online mode.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

As per the selection process of the Imperial College of Engineering and Research, candidates are shortlisted based on their merit of the last qualifying exam of previous education. Further, candidates are selected based on scores of various state/ national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, GATE, MHT CET, CAT, etc. Candidates need to qualify for the respective entrance exam in order to secure a seat at the institute.
Step 3: Counselling Process

After the commencement of all the selection rounds, candidates must register for the DTE counselling process. The final seat/ college allotment for all the UG and PG courses at ICOER is done through DTE counselling.
Step 4: Final Admission

Once the DTE Counselling process is completed, the college releases final merit lists of the selected candidates. Those whose names appeared in the merit list must report to the allotted institute with all original documents and prescribed fees within the scheduled dates.

reviews.review_heading: Review of M.E Mechanical Engineering or Design Engineering.
reviews.review_text: As per my manifestation, I got a seat for PG in the dream college of mine. The coaching and other criteria relevant to the subject are properly planned and executed. But the services like hostel premises, and the food preparations are not good enough, we should adjust ourselves and enjoy the rest of the things.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college, and the facility is very good. The infrastructure of the college is attractive.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very attractive. The facilities of the college are mind-blowing. The college infrastructure is very big, and the college campus is very big and green. The college has a good campus and grounds, and also a college canteen. In a college canteen, hygiene is necessary.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Imperial College of Engineering and Research.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is absolutely good there was a peaceful campus with a good library, classrooms, girls hostel and also Wi-Fi with AC provided by the college. The college sports club is very big stadium, and also food court is very nice; the food is extraordinary.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements, really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good. There are 2 boys hostels and a girls hostel, and the hostels are well-maintained. A Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. A big cricket field, a football ground, a basketball court, and all sports are available. There are 3 meals, and the quality of the food is good and tasty. College buses are available for almost all routes in Chennai, so there will be no issues in travel. Faculty members are quite good and have experience of more than 10 years. Most o...

reviews.review_heading: Thinking the Civil Engineering Curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Imperial College of Engineering and Research boasts superior facilities, including high-speed Wi-Fi for seamless connectivity, modern and well-equipped classrooms for effective learning, state-of-the-art computer labs with advanced software, and a comprehensive library with a vast collection of resources. These facilities provide students with an optimal learning environment.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, and this year it has achieved autonomous institute status.
reviews.review_text: The campus boasts a better environment with large, green, and beautiful surroundings. Only girls' hostels are provided within the college premises, while boys have the option of private hostels or PGs. Numerous food stalls inside the campus cater to lunch needs after the break. Adequate security measures are in place on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Best time of Life was spent here.
reviews.review_text: College location is easily accessible, and the infrastructure and campus are cool. Free internet is available everywhere, but there is a mobile network issue on the campus. Classrooms are big and have facilities like fans, tables, and projectors. Hostel rooms and facilities are good, but its food is not good. We have a nearby canteen, but it has only good tea, not food.

reviews.review_heading: An average college for mechanical.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good; I loved the campus greenery and the fresh environment. We can study in the garden during exam times. Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus, including the canteen and library. Hostel rooms are small, but I really enjoyed that time; no ragging happens, making it a very safe place. The mess food quality is good, and they provide fruits along with meals. The playground for sports is in the backyard of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Reality and my experience.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is fresh and green, and buildings have facilities like lifts and physical disability services. Free Wi-Fi is available in college; the hostel is only for girls, not for us but in the area, many rooms and mess facilities are available, and the canteen food is fresh and good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but need to improve some things.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was excellent, with plenty of greenery on campus and comfortable classrooms. Hostel is only for girls; there is no hostel for boys. We have to stay in rented rooms; the canteen food is good; on-campus sports fields are present; if anyone is injured, medical facilities like first aid are present.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is not good; they cannot teach students.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, and this year renovations are going on just because the college has become the university, as there was no need to do so. The route to reach the college is very poor; no good roads are built, so we need to walk.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Only girls' hostels are available in our college. There are no boys' hostels. Our college canteen food is good. Our college pays more attention to girls' safety. They provide free Wi-Fi and a library. Labs and classroom are good. This college has a large playground.

reviews.review_heading: My engineering college is the best college in Pune .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is nice and there is greenery in this college. There is only girls hostel in the campus and no boys hostel is there. So there is a requirement of boys hostel in the college campus. There are many private hostels . I stay in a private hostel.

reviews.review_heading: College review on, Jspm's Imperial college of engineering and research, wagholi, Pune.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very big campus, in which a large cricket ground, a very famous place called civil chowk, are present. The college has various labs for various departments, like civil transportation labs, structural labs, irrigation labs etc. The college has good Wi-Fi connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good in our college but provides good education.
reviews.review_text: Hostel was not available for boys so they have to stay in PGs or in flats. There were two girls' hostels on campus. The infrastructure of our college was very good. It had a huge library, neat and clean classrooms, and a good campus.

highlights.summary:
Faculty of Art and Design, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences is a constituent institute of Ramaiah University. It is a private-funded university established in 2013 under the Karnataka University Act. The UGC and AICTE recognise the university. Faculty of Art and Design, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences offers UG and PG courses. The flagship course offered at FAD is BDes.

Faculty of Art and Design, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences offers scholarships to deserving students. The institute appoints well-trained and expert faculty members. Faculty of Art and Design, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences based on merit and entrance exams. The institute accepts the RUASAT entrance exam. The key highlights of the Faculty of Art and Design, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences have been tabulated below:

college_info.intro: Faculty of Art and Design, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences popular programme is BDes. The institute offers a BDes course in a full-time, four-year programme at the UG level. The institute offers BDes specialisation in Fashion Design, Interaction Design, and Product Design. Faculty of Art and Design, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences students are placed in top companies in top sectors. BDes students can work as Graphic Designer, Fashion Designer, Interior Designer, UI/UX Designer, etc. The below-mentioned are the Faculty of Art and Design, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences popular programmes:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Faculty of Art and Design, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and PhD courses across Design. At the UG level, the institute offers BDes course across Fashion Design, Interaction Design, and Product Design. At the PG level, the institute provides MDes courses across Product Design. The below-mentioned are Faculty of Art and Design, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences courses along with the eligibility and Faculty of Art and Design, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences fees:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Product Design - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: RUAS is definitely worth your time

review_content.Placements: None of our senior batches has passed out yet. They are still in the fourth year, so we have no particular idea of how placements will be. But M.Des students have got a lot of placements. Mostly, companies from the automotive industry like Ashok Leyland, GM, Mercedes, Nissan Renault and a lot more visit our campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: When it comes to the infrastructure, our campus has an amply high-quality infrastructure with a full-time Wi-Fi connection. There are fully equipped classrooms with projectors in every room. The classrooms are made of high-quality material. They are absolutely perfect with the best equipment available. The university has a football field and a basketball court. The only drawback is the canteen which is not that great.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Product Design - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: A great course but an improvement in infrastructure is much needed

review_content.Placements: The first batch of B.Des product design is in the 4th year and is going through the placements process. Various companies like Tata, General Motors, Renault, etc. have approached the students during placements, offering roles of design development and rendering for the companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is located in Peenya, an industrial area full of factories and industries. The college provides free Wi-Fi throughout the campus and has classrooms and labs located within two floors underground. The hostel and canteen facilities are not great and a lot of improvement is required. Currently, there is a sports room that offers table tennis, boxing, board games, etc. They also now have a newly built basketball court placed near the entrance.

review_summary.college_name: Faculty of Art and Design Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Product Design - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with this college, no placements.

content.Placements: Placements here are very bad. Not even one company has come till now. Not only my department B.Des but for other engineering too. Placements are not happening here. If college people are showing placements on paper, then they are of our main campus.
content.Infrastructure: We have the slowest Wi-Fi connection, and computer labs, no sports area, no cafeteria, no proper fests. But we do have decent classrooms. Hostel's rooms are great but mess food *** to the core. On college website they'll show a sports ground, but that's the parking cum sports ground cum cultural activities arena.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Product Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: RUAS is definitely worth your time

content.Placements: None of our senior batches has passed out yet. They are still in the fourth year, so we have no particular idea of how placements will be. But M.Des students have got a lot of placements. Mostly, companies from the automotive industry like Ashok Leyland, GM, Mercedes, Nissan Renault and a lot more visit our campus.
content.Infrastructure: When it comes to the infrastructure, our campus has an amply high-quality infrastructure with a full-time Wi-Fi connection. There are fully equipped classrooms with projectors in every room. The classrooms are made of high-quality material. They are absolutely perfect with the best equipment available. The university has a football field and a basketball court. The only drawback is the canteen which is not that great.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Product Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: A great course but an improvement in infrastructure is much needed

content.Placements: The first batch of B.Des product design is in the 4th year and is going through the placements process. Various companies like Tata, General Motors, Renault, etc. have approached the students during placements, offering roles of design development and rendering for the companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college is located in Peenya, an industrial area full of factories and industries. The college provides free Wi-Fi throughout the campus and has classrooms and labs located within two floors underground. The hostel and canteen facilities are not great and a lot of improvement is required. Currently, there is a sports room that offers table tennis, boxing, board games, etc. They also now have a newly built basketball court placed near the entrance.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Product Design - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is a descent college but not entirely dependable.

content.Placements: The first batch is about to graduate this year. The college hasn't had any recruiting companies for hiring students. For the parallel department, engineering, though a few companies have been called, they're all service companies that are hiring students to do clerical jobs. There is a placement cell that handles recruiters and internships. However, it hasn't helped the students in any way. Students of 3rd year have an option between a project and a summer internship. Unfortunately, college hasn't provided any kind of support or connection to the students in finding any internship or any industrial network as such.

College is not good, and the management always collects money from students. I left my job to pursue masters as my dream is to become an Automotive Designer, but choosing this college was the worst decision of my life that I will always regret.
review_content.Infrastructure: The amount of fee they are charging, they are not providing such an infrastructure. Air-conditioners do not work properly, the internet is very slow to work, classrooms are stinky, and labs are the worst. The entire computer lab has only 2 or 3 cintiqs which are working properly. Students have no idea why are they charging more money. It is like a robbery, where you have to give money and get nothing in return. Once I tried to talk to the management and the director, which was the worst thing to do. The director is not a person to talk. He is very rude and dumb. He doesn't give a damn about the students, and they only charge money. The whole management is the same.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Digital Modelling - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The college provided really good infrastructure for students.

review_content.Placements: My seniors got placed after completing their second semester. The minimum salary package offered was 2.50 LPA, the highest salary package offered was 6 LPA and the average salary package offered was 3.50 LPA. Around 98% of the students got placed. The remaining 2% of students had communication problems and thus didn't get a job in their first attempt, but after their third semester, they improved their communication skills and got jobs with salary packages in between 3-4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are provided with Wi-Fi and digital facilities. The main problem in the campus is that there is no library for students. Otherwise, there are good facilities in the college. Sports are limited for the management students. They got sports facilities during sports day, but at that time, we enjoyed as well.

admission_overview.title: ADYPU School of Design Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: ADYPU School of Design admissions are offered on both merit and entrance basis depending on the course. The college offers admission to UG, PG and Diploma level programmes in the field of Design. Candidates can apply in an online mode for admission to ADYPU School of Design. The D Y Patil University, School of Design admission to BDes and MDes prorgammes is based on a valid score of DPU AIDAT exam. Further, students also need to appear for the Studio Test and Personal Interview rounds. Find below the latest details on eligibility and admission process for ADYPU School of Design.

eligibility_selection.title: ADYPU School of Design Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: ADYPU School of Design course admissions are subject to fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. The institute offers admissions on an entrance basis for both UG and PG courses. Candidates must meet the basic eligibility requirements of the course before applying for their desired programme. The general eligibility requirements are as below: Students need to appear for a studio test and personal interview round for final selection to the programmes.

courses_table.selection_criteria: DPU AIDAT + Campus Studio Test + PI round

faqs.answer: No, direct admissions are not offered at ADYPU School of Design. Students need to clear all the selection rounds to get a seat at the institute. This includes appearing for the ADYPU AIDAT + Interview + Studio Test.

admission_process.title: ADYPU School of Design Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: ADYPU School of Design admission processcomprises multiple steps. These include application, appearing for the AIDAT and other selection rounds, and admission confirmation. Students can check below the detailed process for ADYPU School of Design admissions:
Application Process 2026

To apply for admission to UG and PG courses at ADYPU School of Design, candidates need to register ofDPU All India Design Aptitude Test (DPU AIDAT).The registration process is conducted in an online mode only. Candidates can visit the official website ofAjeenkya DY Patil Universityto fill the application form
Selection Rounds 2026

The School of Design admissions are entirely entrance-based. For admission toBDes and MDes programmes, candidates are shortlisted based on their valid score in ACET (ADYPU Common Entrance Test). After that, apersonal round and studio testis conducted for the final selection. Applicants must also submit their Statement of Purpose (SOP) and any certificates related to extracurricular activities
Counselling Process 2026
Once all the selection rounds are complete, the selected candidates must appear for counselling process for the final seat allotment.
Release of Offer Letter
At last, the college release offer letter to the selected candidates. These candidates must accept the offer letter by signing the 'Acceptance of Admission Form’.

ADYPU School of Design fee structure may include several components. This includes tuition fees, library fees, caution deposit, and more. Some of these are charged only once during the admission, while the others are to be paid yearly or semester-wise. Students can check the table below to know about theADYPU School of Design fees:
Note: This information is as per official sources and may change.

reviews.review_heading: Review of ADYPU School of Design, Ajeenkya DY Patil University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is good. Our rooms are hygienic, large, and comfortable. They are expensive, as their fees include the hostel. Wi-Fi is not available throughout the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: A College once considered a Premier Institution.
reviews.review_text:
1. Overall facilities were good enough with proper and updated system in classrooms and Labs. Wi-Fi network was good but required frequent logging in to access the internet which is a bit hectic at times. 
2. Hostel was over all good with good facilities,  24/7 electricity and water, clean washrooms and rooms were cleaned regularly.

reviews.review_heading: It is the worst college you can ever imagine.
reviews.review_text: The amount of fee they are charging, they are not providing such an infrastructure. Air-conditioners do not work properly, the internet is very slow to work, classrooms are stinky, and labs are the worst. The entire computer lab has only 2 or 3 cintiqs which are working properly. Students have no idea why are they charging more money. It is like a robbery, where you have to give money and get nothing in return. Once I tried to talk to the management and the director, which was the worst thing to...

reviews.review_heading: The college provided really good infrastructure for students.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are provided with Wi-Fi and digital facilities. The main problem in the campus is that there is no library for students. Otherwise, there are good facilities in the college. Sports are limited for the management students. They got sports facilities during sports day, but at that time, we enjoyed as well.

DYPDC is a college that has been set up by Dilip Chabriya (one of the best automobile designers in India.). As I was inspired by him I joined this college, but later came to know that the college had some issues and Dilip Chabriya left, now there is no proper faculty to teach (in fact there is only one faculty left now for product design) neither the facilities are good. So there are no juniors as well. We are the only pilot batch and the last batch till now. Campus placements is zero. DYPDC is a college that has been set up by Dilip Chabriya (one of the best automobile designers in India.). As I was inspired by him I joined this college, but later came to know that the college had some issues and Dilip Chabriya left, now there is no proper faculty to teach (in fact there is only one faculty left now for product design) neither the facilities are good. So there are no juniors as well. We are the only pilot batch and the last batch till now. Campus placements is zero.

reviews.review_heading: No campus placements are provided, and faculty members change frequently.
reviews.review_text: They show a good room when you come to see the hostel, but when the room is allotted, it is below average and definitely not like the sample room. The bathrooms are the worst. Only one toilet out of ten is on the second floor. The same applies to the bathrooms. Only the rooms are decent but normal.

reviews.review_heading: Zero value and endless frustration is experienced.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were good, hostel wasn’t much maintained, hostel was average basically, quite expensive for the quality provided. Canteen was available, but there was no proper mess facility available. Overall, infrastructure-related facilities were okay. Labs are okay, some devices won’t work, license keys for design related software’s were provided in the last six months, which should have been given to us in the first year itself.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement opportunities for MBA, Automobile design, product designing students.
reviews.review_text: There's an availability of Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, music room. The quality of food served in the mess is good. The campus is full of greenery and there's sufficient ventilation in hostel rooms and classrooms. Many interesting sports and yoga facilities are available in the campus infrastructure as well.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the facilities provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: The college is very good. The college is useful and healthful to us. Wi-Fi facility is available in our college. Labs and classrooms are very good. Especially blackboards are very clear. The canteen is also good.

highlights.summary: UPES 2026 Admissions Open

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at UPES School of Computer Science are BTech and BSc. The college offers these programmes to students at the UG level. Further, the college offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 3 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. After doing a BSc, students can enter into various industries such as the Oil Industry, Agriculture Industry, and others. Further, BSc graduates can find suitable job roles at Space Research Institutes, Educational Institutes, Wildlife and Fishery Departments, and others.
At UPES School of Computer Science, BTech students will be able to learn to deploy and scale AI-powered applications on various robust cloud platforms. Furthermore, they can look for several career opportunities and can become Mining Engineers, Computer Science Engineers, Lecturers/Professors, Construction Engineers, and others. UPES Computer Science school courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at UPES School of Computer Science Dehradun in the table provided below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Many students started their own start-ups
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

fees_and_eligibility.overview: UPES School of Computer Science courses are offered to students at UG, PG, and Doctoral levels. These courses are mainly offered in streams such as Computer Applications, Engineering, etc. At the PG level, the college offers MTech and MCA courses to students. BTech is offered in 8 specialisations while BSc and BCA are in 3 specialisations. The application fee for various courses is INR 1,350. Some of the specialisations in which MTech is provided are Cyber Security, Forensics, Artificial Intelligence, and Machine Learning. faqs.answer: A:    The minimum eligibility criteria for the MTech programmes offered at School of Computer Science, UPES is Class 12 and bachelor's degree with a minimum of 60% aggregate. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science (Global Pathway Program) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Industry-focused curriculum with great campus life.

review_content.Placements: Placements at UPES are pretty solid. Around 90% of students get placed each year. The top package has gone up to 50 LPA, and the average is about 7 to 8 LPA, and companies like Amazon, Microsoft, Deloitte, PwC, and ONGC hire from here, with roles ranging from engineers and developers to business analysts and legal associates. Placements are a strong point, though internships could be improved.
review_content.Infrastructure: College offers modern infrastructure with Wi-Fi, labs, smart classrooms, and a rich library. Hostels are safe with decent food, medical care is available 24/7, and the campus has strong sports and fitness facilities for an overall balanced student life.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Cloud Computing and Virtualization Technology) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: UPES 2025 updated information, all about infrastructure, placements, facilities, hostel, etc.

review_content.Placements: Usually, in UPES, students get placed with a decent package of around 8 LPA. When it comes to the highest package, it goes above 30 LPA, and average is 8-10 LPA. Many companies come to the college and take students with a good package, but it totally depends on the student whether they will be able to clear it or not.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is pretty good, and UPES has its own Wi-Fi named UPESNET. It has a good high internet speed, and also the labs and classrooms are not the same as those at CU, GUE, and other private universities. It has far better infrastructure with a good environment, but when it comes to campus hostel, you are charged a lot higher fees, i.e., Rs. 1,94,000 for a triple sharing room, and the food in the mess is not of that good level. As a student who lived on campus for a year, it was very tough to eat that food.

faqs.answer: At UPES School of Computer Science, the minimum score needed to be admitted to the Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) programme is 50% in both Class X and XII, plus a minimum of 50% in the combined subjects of Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics in Class XII. Furthermore, following the exam, the cutoff scores for UPESEAT 2024, the entrance exam for UG engineering programs at UPES, will be disclosed. review_summary.college_name: UPES School of Computer Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security and Digital Forensics) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college can improve on the placement records.

content.Placements: A smaller number of student placement records have been shown this year, and I heard about the fact that Microsoft banned this college from entering for placements due to an internal issue. The placements average at 7 to 10LPA, that too if you are qualified with a good amount of knowledge in the field.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are fair, sports facilities can be improved, and there are frequent Wi-Fi problems. I went inside the on campus hostel and noticed the rooms are smaller but ventilated well with a good mess. There needs to be more events based on communities outside the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Cloud Computing and Virtualization Technology) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Career prospects are strong, though classrooms can feel average.

content.Placements: UPES has excellent placement opportunities, especially in CSE. Around 90-95% students are placed with the highest package going above 50 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. Opportunities are there, but for top performers. Core roles are limited, and many companies offer mass recruitment profiles.
content.Infrastructure: UPES has one of the best infrastructures among private universities in India, but classrooms should have AC. Hostel and cafeteria are decent, the view from hostel is epic. Wi-Fi-enabled labs are advanced, well-stocked libraries. Sometimes you feel crowded in hostel.

Placements are a strong point, though internships could be improved.

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is pretty good, and UPES has its own Wi-Fi named UPESNET. It has a good high internet speed, and also the labs and classrooms are not the same as those at CU, GUE, and other private universities. It has far better infrastructure with a good environment, but when it comes to campus hostel, you are charged a lot higher fees, i.e., Rs. 1,94,000 for a triple sharing room, and the food in the mess is not of that good level. As a student who lived on campus for a year, it was very tough to eat that food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A good college for a person seeking a nice social life with good studies.

content.Placements: Here at UPES, in my course B.Tech CSE, almost 90% of students are placed. But package is not that much for the majority, like average salary package is almost about 4-5 LPA, not more than that. Highest salary package I heard was about 55 LPA (not sure if it was off or on campus ). Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, etc. All students get an internship from UPES since it is a part of course.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure here at UPES is very nice, all blocks are well furnished with peaceful white theme classes. In campus hostels are good. Since I live outside the campus hostel, I heard that the mess food there is not that good. Hostel has a lot of indoor games. There are many grounds dedicated to every sport. Regular contests and competitions occur for sports.

admission_overview.college_name: UPES School of Computer Science Admission 2025: Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Application & Selection

admission_process.title: School of Computer Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: School of Computer Science, UPES admissions are primarilymerit-basedfor most of the courses. is a constituent school of theUPES. Formerly known as Centre for Information Technology, the school offers undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral programmes in various specialisations. The popular offered programmes are BTech and BCA programmes at the undergraduate, MTech at postgraduate and PhD programme at doctoral level. School of Computer Science, UPES admission toBTech, MTech and PhD programmes are entrance-based, whereas, BCA admissions are done on a merit basis. More detailed information around School of Computer Science, UPES admission 2025 are mentioned below:

TheSchool of Computer Science of UPESoffers five under graduate and postgraduate level courses in various disciplines related to Computer Science. Candidates willing to take admission to School of Computer Science courses must check the course-specific eligibility and selection criteria mentioned below:

Candidates seeking admission to the School of Computer Science course must begin the admission process by the minimum requirements to apply for the course. The basic eligibility of undergraduate courses is that the candidates must have passed Class 12 and for postgraduate courses, the candidates must have passed graduation. The detailed course-wise eligibility criteria is stated in the table mentioned above. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria need to apply for their desired course by visiting the official website of UPES School of Computer Science. The UPES application process is conducted online. Applicants need to pay the specified application fee and submit the application form before the stipulated date.
After successful submission of the UPES Application, candidates need to undergo a course-specific selection process as mentioned below:

Aspirants who clear the selection rounds are offered admission at UPES School of Computer Science. Interested candidates need to pay the seat confirmation fee within the stipulated time to secure their admission.

headings.text: School of Computer Science Admission 2025: Eligibility and Selection

lists: Candidates are selected in the BTech programme based onUPESEAT/JEE Main/SAT/Board Merit / SAT/ CUET
Admissions to the BSc and BCA programmes are done based on personal interview

Selection to MTech programme is based on screenig of the Application form and a personal interview
Candidates seeking admission to PhD programme are selected based on Research Entrance Test (RET), conducted by UPES followed by personal interview (PI)

courses_data.name: School of Computer Science, UPES BTech Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:JEE Main, UPESEAT, SAT India, Christ University Entrance Test CUET, ICAR AIEEA, IISER Entrance Exam, OUAT Entrance Exam, SET, UGAT, Pantnagar University Entrance Exam
courses_data.description: School of Computer Science, UPES offers a Full Time BE/BTech course of 4 years duration. Available in 1 specialisations, students can get into this course on the basis of a valid score in JEE Main/MHT CET exam. School of Computer ScienceBTech(Computer Science Engineering) programme is offered for a duration of four years spread across eight semesters. Candidates can opt for major specialisation one month prior to end semester exam of the first year and minor specialisation to be selected from any other specialisation. These programmes are offered in academic collaboration with IBM, Xebia and Oracle. To become eligible for BTech programme, candidates must have passed Class 10 and 12 with PCM and a minimum of 50% aggregate. The selection of the candidates in BTech programme is based on UPESEAT. Minors of SoCSN-1: Apart from the specialisation to choose from any other specialization and Industry partners provide badges for the Minor as well. This is part of 160 credits itself. BTech (Computer Science Engineering) Specialisations Eligibility Criteria Eligibility Criteria Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Qualifying exams:JEE Main/UPESEAT/SAT/ Board merit Minimum aggregate of 50% in Class 10, Class 12 (PCM) 30 each Banking, Financial Services and Insurance Big Data 160 Blockchain 30 each Business Analytics and Optimization Cloud Computing and Virtualization Technology 80 each Computational Sustainability Cyber Security and Forensics 120 each DevOps E-Commerce 60 each Graphics and Gaming Healthcare Informatics Internet of Things and Smart Cities 40 IT Infrastructure 30 each Mainframe Technology Mobile Application Development Oil and Gas Informatics Open Source and Open Standards

faqs.question: What is the minimum eligibility criteria for M.Tech programmes offered at School of Computer Science, UPES?
faqs.answer: To become eligible for M.Tech programme offered at School of Computer Science, UPES, candidates must have obtained a minimum of 60% aggregate in Class 10 and 12 and must have a BTech/ BE (IT/CSE), MCA, MSc (Physics/ Math/ Statistics) degree with a minimum of 60 per cent aggregate or equivalent.

faqs.question: How many students can do a M.Tech at UPES School of Computer Science?
faqs.answer: The M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Analytics) program at UPES Dehradun accepts 10 students. The course is two years long and is at the PG level.

faqs.question: How many students can do a M.Tech at UPES School of Computer Science?
faqs.answer: The M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Analytics) program at UPES Dehradun accepts 10 students. The course is two years long and is at the PG level.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in UPES for BTech CSE?
faqs.answer: UPES offers a full-time, four year BTech CSE course through its School of Computer Science. Admission to the course is entrance based. Candidates seeking admission need to meet the BTech CSE eligibility criteria and under go the selection process, as mentioned below, to secure admission at UPES School of Computer Science BTech:CoursesEligibilitySelection CriteriaBE / BTechPassed class 10 and class 12 with a minimum of 50% marks with Physics, Chemistry and Maths as compulsory subjectsUPESEAT / UPESEAT1 / Board Merit / UPESEAT2CUET

faqs.question: How can candidates join School of Computer Science, UPES?
faqs.answer: To join UPES School of Computer Science, candidates must have valid scores in accepted entrance exams such asJEE Main,CUET, and others. The mode of UPES School of Computer Science admission is online. Admission to various courses is based on merit and scores of entrance exams. If applying though JEE Main, candidates must prepare well for the entrance exams by practicing theJEE Main question papers. Prepare well according o theJEE Mains exam pattern. Make sure to pay the application fee which is INR 1,350.

faqs.question: Can I get into UPES School of Computer Science M.Tech with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: To get into the UPES School of Computer Science M.Tech program, you must have at least 60% marks in both your 10th and 12th grade. You must also have a minimum of 60% in your graduation.You can apply to UPES College based on your board merit. You must also take the annual UPSEAT exam to get admission.

The top recruiters of UPES School of Computer Science in 2023 included Autodesk India, Schlumberger, Amazon, Adobe, Deloitte Microsoft, EY, KPMG, PwC , etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: UPES School of Computer Science Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college can improve on the placement records.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are fair, sports facilities can be improved, and there are frequent Wi-Fi problems. I went inside the on campus hostel and noticed the rooms are smaller but ventilated well with a good mess. There needs to be more events based on communities outside the college.

reviews.review_heading: Career prospects are strong, though classrooms can feel average.
reviews.review_text: UPES has one of the best infrastructures among private universities in India, but classrooms should have AC. Hostel and cafeteria are decent, the view from hostel is epic. Wi-Fi-enabled labs are advanced, well-stocked libraries. Sometimes you feel crowded in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Industry-focused curriculum with great campus life.
reviews.review_text: College offers modern infrastructure with Wi-Fi, labs, smart classrooms, and a rich library. Hostels are safe with decent food, medical care is available 24/7, and the campus has strong sports and fitness facilities for an overall balanced student life.

reviews.review_heading: UPES 2025 updated information, all about infrastructure, placements, facilities, hostel, etc.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty good, and UPES has its own Wi-Fi named UPESNET. It has a good high internet speed, and also the labs and classrooms are not the same as those at CU, GUE, and other private universities. It has far better infrastructure with a good environment, but when it comes to campus hostel, you are charged a lot higher fees, i.e., Rs. 1,94,000 for a triple sharing room, and the food in the mess is not of that good level. As a student who lived on campus for a year, it was very tough...

reviews.review_heading: A good college for a person seeking a nice social life with good studies.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure here at UPES is very nice, all blocks are well furnished with peaceful white theme classes. In campus hostels are good. Since I live outside the campus hostel, I heard that the mess food there is not that good. Hostel has a lot of indoor games. There are many grounds dedicated to every sport. Regular contests and competitions occur for sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best B.Teach college in Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities here are great. Course facilities are very good, and the department is well-equipped with available Wi-Fi. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped, and the library is excellent. Medical facilities are available at any time, and sports activities happen daily.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best B.Tech college in Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities here are excellent. The course facilities are very good, and the department is outstanding. Wi-Fi is available everywhere, and the labs are good. Classrooms are well-equipped, and the library is accessible. Medical facilities are available at any time. Sports are promoted, with games happening daily.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best B.Teach college in Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are excellent. The course facilities are very good, and the department is outstanding. Wi-Fi is available everywhere, and the labs are well-equipped. Classrooms are well-equipped, and the library is accessible. Medical facilities are available at any time. Sports are promoted, with games happening daily.

reviews.review_heading: Strong academics, good industry connections, excellent placements, and modern infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not that good in UPES. Labs are fully furnished with high-quality equipment. Classrooms are also very good, with excellent furniture, AC, and smart classroom facilities. The library is fully maintained and too good. Hostel facilities provide sufficient needs for students in their rooms, and the hostel mess is very good. Medical facilities are also very good, and sports and games are excellent at UPES.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with this college's infrastructure, faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college, hostel, and library. We can play games on the ground whenever we want. There is 24/7 Wi-Fi availability, even the hostel food is also very good. They change the menu based on students' choices. The medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: A college is in the midst of the prettiest mountains of Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: Labs a pretty well built. Although in the first year, there is not much access to labs. We have access to the labs at our own will. They are air-conditioned. Hostels are well-built with almost all facilities. Cleaners do their job well.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities, but all faculty members are not good. Placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in our college is good. Overall, Wi-Fi connections with good labs, classrooms, and a library. Hostel facilities and food are good, and there are medical facilities. Sports and games activities are also available for students.

reviews.review_heading: UPES provides a great college life. Placements completely depend on you and your skill.
reviews.review_text: College has Wi-Fi, modern labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are comfortable and equipped with basic amenities. Mess food is decent and campus has medical facilities. Sports facilities include cricket, basketball, volleyball, and badminton courts.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but if you can afford. You can get a good placement if you develop your skills.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good. They have good classrooms. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. I personally prefer a hostel outside campus because of some liberty and food is not good. Medical facility is okay. For sports and games, college has 1 ground on both campuses.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the university. The faculty and placements are also good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our campus is really good, and it is so large that it is difficult to cover on foot. Classrooms are clean and well-maintained. We have various labs for different subjects, all of which are well-equipped. I don't know much about the hostel as I am a day scholar.

college_info.college_name: UPES School of Computer Science Scholarship Details

paragraphs: UPES School of Computer Science offers meritorious students a number of scholarships on the tuition fees to support their education. Students who wish to enroll in any course at UPES Dehradun will have to score a good percentage as a part of the selection process. Apart from this, students should also meet other criteria that the university has chosen to avail the scholarship.

UPES School of Computer Science will provide a concession in fees based on scores scored by students in the entrance exam such as JEE Main, JEE Advanced, CUET, CBSE (+2), and exams from other central/ State boards of India.
The university offers a wide range of scholarships to all students of the University. Some of the UPES Dehradun School of Computer Science scholarship categories and their criteria are listed below:
1. Entry Level Scholarship
Category
Scholarship
Class 12 Marks (Overall)
JEE/ CUET
CUET
Girls Students

Scholarship

For Example: If a student scores 80.7% or 80.9% in class 12, his/her percentage will be rounded off to 80%, and will get a scholarship on tuition fees for 1st year only.
2. Scholarship for MBA students

Waiver (in tuition fees)

Note:
3. Free Ships Scholarship

The UPES’ Free Ships Scholarships are built to uplift prospective students from low-income families without added clauses or strings attached. A total of 51 seats are allotted with an upper age limit of 20 years for UG programs and 25 years for PG programs - and is provided on both, the tuition fee and hostel fee.
Image source: official website
4. Sports Scholarships

The University allotted 50 seats for sportspeople who excel in a range of sports from cricket, football, and athletics to shooting, chess, and table tennis; as it aims to make sports an inclusive part of the academic curriculum. The scholarship percentile under this impressive initiative ranges from 35% to 100% depending on the number of national & international sports achievements a candidate has.
Image source: official website
5. Academic Scholarship

This scholarship is applicable for both UG and PG students and for the second year onwards. The scholarship will be awarded to 10% of the total students enrolled in each of the programmes or 1 student whichever is higher. The 10% will be rounded off to the nearest next number. Here are the criteria:

UPES also provides fellowships for MTech and MDes programs, and financial support under their ‘We Care’ initiative in case a student loses any of the earning parents.

review_summary.college_name: Pearl Academy New Friends Colony Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Des in Fashion Design - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The college has good faculty, infrastructure is good but the campus area is very small.

content.Placements: The college guarantees 100% placement to all the students. The college has average packaged companies or designers for recruitment. The students get placed to work under known designers and gain experience. The roles offered in the courses are of as a designer, social media influencer and so.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a very modernised infrastructure with fully equipped security facility to centralised air-conditioning and lift facility. The college does not have its own hostel but the canteen food and medical facilities are present. The college is a fashion and technology college, so has less opportunity for sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des in Fashion Design - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Overall performance of our college.

content.Placements: According to the college, there was 97 percent placement but we don't if that is the exact percentage. Seniors said that some Pearl pass out designers also come to take the interview. They don't provide salary as per expectation. Seniors are not happy with their placement. They want good placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. Completely air conditioned. All the classrooms and labs are maintained. Earlier, the food of the canteen was not of a good quality but now they have a variety and good quality food. Stationary is also good, sells goods at a reasonable price. Stairs need to be maintained and lift too. Should have cross ventilation. We have a think tank where we work.

content.Placements: Our college provides ensured placements to our course students in good companies or under great artists and designers. Our college provides 85% of placements for students. The salary package offered ranges from 3-8 LPA for the students initially depending on their skills and achievements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has huge classrooms and labs all over with high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity. The college building is fully air-conditioned. Our college has a maximum of its walls portrait with graphites. Our college has various rooms for all kinds of different activities related to the course like stitching room, photoshoot, stationery room, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des in Fashion Design - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the biggest hub for fashion and design.

content.Placements: Almost 97% of the students got placements, and many opportunities are available for internships. Our college has very good and highly recognised collaborations with big brands. The average salary package offered is 4 LPA, and the highest salary package offered is 8 LPA. Companies like Louis Vuitton, Gucci and Manish Malhotra also visited for internships. WGSN also visited our college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good. Labs are very good, and the availability of products is maximum with appropriate quality. Canteen and other stationery items are sufficient. We have all types of machines needed for our projects. Collaborations and occasions are very helpful. Events are very helpful, and people who come to give knowledge are also of some level. Our college helps to improve our projects. Books are available in the library, which is very good.

admission_process.title: Pearl Academy New Friends Colony Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Pearl Academy, New Friends Colony admissions2025 have started. Candidates can pursue UG, PG and Professional Certificates in several specialisations at the campus. These are BDes, BBA, MBA, MDes, etc.Pearl Academy, New Friends Colony, admission is conducted in several cycles, and candidates can participate in all cycles. As per Pearl Academy admission process, candidates need to clear the Pearl Academy Entrance Exam, popularly known as the PAF Entrance Exam, followed by a Personal Interview (PI). PAF Entrance Exam consists of a General Proficiency Test (GPT) and a Design Aptitude Test (DAT). Students are allotted campuses according to their rank in the entrance test and the preferences filled in the application form.
Pearl Academy 2025 Admissions Open:

PA, NFC course admissionis completely merit-based & Entrance exam-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the college must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for some of thePearl Academy, New Friends Colony courses:

Pearl New Friends Colony fees are cumulative of multiple components such as tuition fee, refundable security deposit, registration fee, and alumni fee. An 18% GST is also included in the one-time fee payment. Candidates can check out the table below for the course-wise tuition fees:
NOTE:The above-mentioned fee is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, is indicative.

For admission to Pearl Academy New Friends Colony, candidates have to go through each of the stages of the admission procedure. The process involves online registration, entrance exams, selection rounds, and admission confirmation. More details about each of the stages in the admission process are explained below:
STEP 1: Pearl AcademyNew Friends ColonyApplication Process 2025

Candidates seeking admission at Pearl Academy New Friends Colony must fill out and submit a duly filled application form, provided they have met the basic eligibility criteria prescribed by the institute. The application fee for Bachelor's and Master's degree programmes is INR 2,000, and for Professional Certificate Courses is INR 500. Candidates can read more about thePearl Academy Application Form 2025to understand the procedure better.
STEP 2: Shortlisting of Students

Candidates who register successfully need to take the entrance test in the next step. ThePearl Academy Exam Resultsare published on the Pearl Academy's official website. Additionally, individual scorecards are also emailed to the students. The candidates are shortlisted based on their scores in the accepted entrance exams, like the Pearl Academy Entrance Exam.
STEP 3: Personal Interview
Shortlisted candidates must appear for the interview round.
STEP 4: Payment of Admission Fee & Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates must pay thePearl Academy NFC feeto confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Is there a one-time fee payment at the Pearl Academy, New Friends Colony for MBA programme?
faqs.answer: Yes, in addition to semester-wise tuition, students enroling in the Pearl Academy, New Friends Colony MBA programme are required to pay a one-time fee of INR 82,000, which typically covers registration, alumni, and security charges. This fee is separate from the recurring semester fees and is part of the total programme cost.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at Pearl Academy NFC?
faqs.answer: Pearl Academy, New Friends Colony offers MBA course for a duration of two year in a full-time mode. The tuition for MBA course ranges between INR 10.9 Lacs - INR 15.3 lakh. Apart from this, candidates also have to pay for one-time charges, which includes Alumni Fee, Registration Fees and Security Deposit (Refundable). This information is sourced from unofficial sources. Candidates are advised to visit the official website to know more about Pearl Academy MBA fee.

faqs.question: What are the fees for BBA programmes at Pearl Academy New Friends Colony?
faqs.answer: The tuition fees for the BBA programme at Pearl Academy New Friends Colony in 2024 are between INR19.3 Lakh–25.3 Lakh . The BBA programme is three years long.

The library offers access to an extensive collection of books, journals, and magazines. It serves as a knowledge hub where students can explore ideas, deepen research, and translate inspiration into meaningful work.

cafeteria.description: The campus features a well-equipped cafeteria offering healthy, hygienic, and diverse food options, catering to different dietary preferences in a comfortable and student-friendly environment.
