labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, photography laboratory, photography studio, dark room, make-up studio, resource center, Fashion Design Studio, Pattern Making and Draping Lab, Garment Construction Lab, Textile Lab, Fashion Styling Lab, Design Studio, Makers’ Lab, Mac Lab, Wacom Lab

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty, infrastructure is good but the campus area is very small.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very modernised infrastructure with fully equipped security facility to centralised air-conditioning and lift facility. The college does not have its own hostel but the canteen food and medical facilities are present. The college is a fashion and technology college, so has less opportunity for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Overall performance of our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Completely air conditioned. All the classrooms and labs are maintained. Earlier, the food of the canteen was not of a good quality but now they have a variety and good quality food. Stationary is also good, sells goods at a reasonable price. Stairs need to be maintained and lift too. Should have cross ventilation. We have a think tank where we work.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is amazing to be in.
reviews.review_text: Our college has huge classrooms and labs all over with high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity. The college building is fully air-conditioned. Our college has a maximum of its walls portrait with graphites. Our college has various rooms for all kinds of different activities related to the course like stitching room, photoshoot, stationery room, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is extremely good, but it is a bit high on the fee.
reviews.review_text: The campus has a building of 4 floors with all the courses on each floor. Walls had graffiti designs all over, and not even a single wall was plain or simple. All kinds of artwork were displayed on every corner and wall of the building. Furniture was also colourful.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the biggest hub for fashion and design.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good. Labs are very good, and the availability of products is maximum with appropriate quality. Canteen and other stationery items are sufficient. We have all types of machines needed for our projects. Collaborations and occasions are very helpful. Events are very helpful, and people who come to give knowledge are also of some level. Our college helps to improve our projects. Books are available in the library, which is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is growing with good facilities and resources.
reviews.review_text: The quality of classrooms and labs are quite maintained and hygienic. The cafeteria serves a wide variety of food options at a reasonable price. Students also have access to E-library. The infrastructure of our college is beautiful.

college_info.college_name: Pearl Academy New Friends Colony Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, in addition to semester-wise tuition, students enroling in the Pearl Academy, New Friends Colony MBA programme are required to pay a one-time fee of INR 82,000, which typically covers registration, alumni, and security charges. This fee is separate from the recurring semester fees and is part of the total programme cost.

All applicants of Pearl Academy in all UG and PG programmes for the Academic Year 2025 are eligible for the Scholarship. Applicants are not required to apply for the Scholarship separately. Applicants will be offered the Scholarship based on their performance in the Pearl Entrance Exam, which includes a Written Exam (GPT & DAT) and a Personal Interview. Applicants for Fashion and Design programmes are also required to showcase their portfolio, which serves as a platform for evaluating their technical and conceptual proficiency.

Pearl Academy, New Friends Colony MBA scholarships 2025 include the Sherryl Kintu Scholarship, offering 100% tuition fee coverage (excluding registration, alumni, and security fees) for students with a family income below INR 8 LPA, and a Merit-Based Scholarship awarded based on the candidate's performance in the Pearl Entrance Exam.

Pearl Academy, New Friends Colony offers MBA course for a duration of two year in a full-time mode. The tuition for MBA course ranges between INR 10.9 Lacs - INR 15.3 lakh. Apart from this, candidates also have to pay for one-time charges, which includes  Alumni Fee, Registration Fees and Security Deposit (Refundable). This information is sourced from unofficial sources. Candidates are advised to visit the official website to know more about Pearl Academy MBA fee.

Maulana Azad University Kolkata comprises more than 30 departments, including Food Science, Applied Physics, Applied Chemistry, Industrial Engineering & Management, Information Technology, Emerging Technologies, and others. The affialted colleges and departmnets of the university offer a wide range of courses at the UG, PG, diploma and PhD level, across various streams. BTech, BSc and MBA are the popular programmes offered at the university.

reviews_list.review_title: Narula Institute of Technology, the college you can't regret.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 60-70 percent of students got placed from my course. The highest package is 27 LPA, the lowest is 6 LPA, and the average is around 8 LPA-9 LPA. Recruiting companies are Cognizant, TCS, etc. In the Big 4, you can get internships. Roles offered are AI and ML engineer, analyst roles, developer roles, SDE roles, manager, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. Not upto the mark but by far I'll say good. Small campus and things, you'll feel like you're still in school. Food quality is decent. Also, there's a cafeteria and canteen so you get food for really cheap and there are cafes too in front of the college so you will not face any problem. The hostel is outside the campus because the campus is very small like 5 acres.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Decent college, decent placement, average faculty.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students got placed. "Senco Gold" was the top recruiter with a 3.6 LPA package, and the lowest was 1.2 LPA. The top role offered was Sales Intern. 100% of students got an internship in various companies like Biskfarm, TCS, Senco Gold, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is satisfactory. Classrooms are clean and well-maintained, and basic facilities, such as the library, labs, and Wi-Fi, are available. The food is good, and both veg and non-veg options are available. The hostel is also very clean, and every basic need is available, like AC/Non-AC rooms with fan, light, gas for cooking, washing machines, and other essential things.

individual_reviews.title: Very good and prestigious college with good reviews.

content.Placements: Almost 70 to 80 percent of students are placed in various companies. The highest package of this college is 16.80 LPA, and the average package is 4 to 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Suzuki, Deloitte, etc. Almost every student gets an internship in various fields in different companies.
content.Infrastructure: There is a very good infrastructure in the college with neat and clean classrooms. The whole college has Wi-Fi facilities, modern labs, and a library with many types of technical books. The college has separate hostels for girls and boys. Food is very good and hygienic.

But not alot company has been came in campus for specialization. An ML engineer is the main role offered in my course. Teamplus like company, has recruited the students and senior suggest study, you will get a placement.

As the machines are old, the remaining library and all are so beautiful, there is no boys' hostel facility in the college, and so it's difficult for the students outside West Bengal. Mess and canteen food is delicious and good at less than a little. Affordable price, sports and games are, but you have to carry the expenses.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Decent college, decent placement, average faculty.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students got placed. "Senco Gold" was the top recruiter with a 3.6 LPA package, and the lowest was 1.2 LPA. The top role offered was Sales Intern. 100% of students got an internship in various companies like Biskfarm, TCS, Senco Gold, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is satisfactory. Classrooms are clean and well-maintained, and basic facilities, such as the library, labs, and Wi-Fi, are available. The food is good, and both veg and non-veg options are available. The hostel is also very clean, and every basic need is available, like AC/Non-AC rooms with fan, light, gas for cooking, washing machines, and other essential things.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is surrounded by nature and greenery.

content.Placements: 70 to 80 percent of people from our previous batch are placed. The average package is 5 LPA and the highest package is 12 LPA. The whole batch is provided with internship. The faculty is great they provide you with trips and great skills that help you crack the internship easily.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi available, the classrooms are pretty decent and the library has ample amount of books. The labs are pretty good. If we talk about mess food, they have lots of variety from veg to non veg.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very knowledgeable and hold a strong degree and will always try to help you professionally and personally. They will help you with literally everything. They have knowledge that will help you with academics. They provide great support and help you build the skill.

admission_overview.college_name: MAKAUT Course Admissions 2025: Registration, Eligibility, Fee & Dates

admission_overview.title: MAKAUT Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: MAKAUT, also known as Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology, offers UG, PG, and doctoral programmes. The courses cover the domains of Engineering, Science, Arts and Social Sciences etc. Admission process at MAKAUT is entrance based. MAKAUT accepts a few more state/ national-level exams for admission, such as WBJEE, PGET, UGC NET (including JRF)/ CSIR NET for admission to other UG, PG and doctoral-level programmes. The university also conducts its own entrance exam, JEMAT, for admission into MBA and MHA courses. Applications for all the offered courses are accepted strictly in the online mdoe. Offline applications are not entertained at all. The duration of most UG courses is three to four years, with PG programmes extending up to two years. Read on to know more aboiut eligibility, admission and application process, fees etc. at MAKAUT.

eligibility_selection.title: MAKAUT Eligibility & Selection 2026

paragraphs: MAKAUT conducts an entrance exams to select candidates for specific courses. Candidates can check the deatiled steps below:
Step 1: MAKAUT Application Process 2026

Candidates fulfilling the eligibility requirements can apply online for MAKAUT admission. As per the information collated from the web, aspirants must pay an application fee to register for a course. Fill the form and upload the specified documents to complete the application process.
Step 2: Selection Process

MAKAUT shortlists candidates for most of the courses based on the entrance exam conducted by the university. To appear for the exam, download the MAKAUT admit card. The university considers entrance exams such asWBJEE, PGCET, etc. for admission to specific courses. The first level of selection after the application process will be either based on the entrance exam or academic merit.
Step 3: Merit List & Counselling

After the completion of selection rounds, the exam conducting body declares a merit list to announce the selected candidates names. Further, selected students are called for counselling and document verification round. You also need to payMAKAUT feeto confirm your seat in the university.

courses_data.description: MAKAUT offers 4-year full-time BTech course. The duration for the course is four years. The university follows a semester based system with the four years divided into 8 semesters. The university conducts an exam at the end of each semester. Students must pass this exam to proceed to the next semester. BTech Admission is entrance based at MAKAUT. For admission to this course, students should have valid scores in JEE Main or MHT CET exam. The minimum eligibility for the course is passing Class 12 with atleast 45% aggregate in PCM/PCMB stream. Students must meet the minimum eligibility ofMAKAUT BTechbefore applying for admission to the same. The programme offers over 700 specialisations, thus providing students with a wide range of choices.

faqs.question: Does MAKAUT grant direct admission to BTech programme?
faqs.answer: No, admission to BTech programme at MAKAUT is entrance based with the university accepting JEE MAIN scores for the same. Direct admissions are not granted to any student category. The minimum eligibility for BTech mut be met before applying for admission to the same.

faqs.question: What is the duration of BTech programme offered at MAKAUT?
faqs.answer: BTech at MAKAUT fhas a duration of four years. The university follows a semester based system and hence, BTech is divided into 8 semesters. Students must pass each semester exam conducted at the end of each semester to proceed to the next.

faqs.question: Can I change my college under MAKAUT?
faqs.answer: No, candidates do not have the option to change their college under Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology. If they wish to change, they are required to appear for the necessary entrance test again. However, a few articles on the internet mention that students can change their college after the first year but they are required to clear all the exams of the first year for the same. For better clarity on the subject, candidates are advised to reach out to the admission office of MAKAUT or the affiliated institute under the university.

faqs.question: Which exam is required for admission to BCA at MAKAUT?
faqs.answer: MAKAUT offers a full-time BCA programme. In order to get admission, students must appear for CET. It is conducted byMAKAUT WB. Candidates must have qualified Class 12 to appear for this exam.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for BSc courses at MAKAUT?
faqs.answer: MAKAUT offers a three-year BSc programme spread across various specialisations. Any student who has passed Class 12 from a recorgnised board of education is eligible to apply for BSc courses at MAKAUT. Moreover, the students seeking admission to the aforementioned course would be required to have a valid CET (conducted by MAKAUT) score.

faqs.question: How many seats are there for MSc in MAKAUT?
faqs.answer: MAKAUT offers a total of1548 seatsfor its MSc programme. These seats are distributed among more than more than 10 affiliated colleges of the university. Some of the colleges included are the Institute of Management Study, Guru Nanak Institute of Pharmaceutical Science and Technology, and more.

placement_data.title: MAKAUT Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: MAKAUT placement data 2025 is not released. Earlier, the highest and median package recorded during MAKAUT BTech placements 2024 was INR 7 LPA and 4.5 LPA . BTech placement rate in 2024 was 81%.

As per the NIRF report 2025, MTech placement rate recorded in 2024 was 78.2% and the median package received was 4.5 LPA . Further, MBA and MPharm placement rate in 2024 was 100% . The median package received by MBA and MPharm students was 5 LPA and 2.5 LPA .

faqs.question: Is MAKAUT good in terms of placements?
faqs.answer: MAKAUT provides good placements to its graduating students. The students are given excellent placement support every year placing them in top companies. Check out the table below to know the key highlights of the MAKAUT placements 2024: Course Total Students (2024) Students Placed (2024) Median Salary (2024) UG 3-year 213 141 INR 3.50 LPA BTech 106 80 INR 4.50 LPA PG 2-year 509 373 INR 3.26 LPA NOTE: The above data is obtained from the NIRF report 2025

faqs.question: What is the highest placement package in MAKAUT?
faqs.answer: The highest package recorded during MAKAUT BTech placements 2024 was 7 LPA. During the BTech placement drive 2023 and 2022, it was 8 LPA and 7.7 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the placement rate recorded during MAKAUT placements?
faqs.answer: Placement rate recorded during MAKAUT BTech placements 2024 was 81%. For MTech, the placement rate in 2024 was 78.2%. In addition, 100% placement was recorded in MPharm and MBA programs.

faqs.question: How successful are the placements at MAKAUT?
faqs.answer: MAKAUT has been providing successful placements over the years. The students are given excellent placement support every year placing them in top companies. faqs.question: What are the trends seen in the median package during MAKAUT MBA placements?
faqs.answer: The median recorded over the past two years during MAKAUT MBA placements 2024 and 2023 was constant, i.e. INR 5 LPA. In 2022, it was 4.5 LPA.

faqs.answer: MAKAUT MBA average package data is not released. As per the Management NIRF report 2025, MBA median package recorded in 2024 and 2023 was 5 LPA. In 2023, the median package was 4.5 LPA.

As per the overall score, MAKAUT has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Engineering' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend. In 2025, MAKAUT fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

qs_world.description:
Based on the rankings from QS World University Rankings, MAKAUT outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the QS World University Rankings system. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have dropped in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, MAKAUT fell 53 ranks to #574 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, MAKAUT fell 9 ranks to #157 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Sanaka Educational Trust's Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Very good and prestigious college with good reviews.
reviews.review_text: There is a very good infrastructure in the college with neat and clean classrooms. The whole college has Wi-Fi facilities, modern labs, and a library with many types of technical books. The college has separate hostels for girls and boys. Food is very good and hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Heritage Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: HIT is good for value for money, and with a good ROI, you have to work hard here.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good except the first semester. As the machines are old, the remaining library and all are so beautiful, there is no boys' hostel facility in the college, and so it's difficult for the students outside West Bengal. Mess and canteen food is delicious and good at less than a little. Affordable price, sports and games are, but you have to carry the expenses.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by NIT - Narula Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Narula Institute of Technology, the college you can't regret.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Not upto the mark but by far I'll say good. Small campus and things, you'll feel like you're still in school. Food quality is decent. Also, there's a cafeteria and canteen so you get food for really cheap and there are cafes too in front of the college so you will not face any problem. The hostel is outside the campus because the campus is very small like 5 acres.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by iLEAD KolkataReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Decent college, decent placement, average faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is satisfactory. Classrooms are clean and well-maintained, and basic facilities, such as the library, labs, and Wi-Fi, are available. The food is good, and both veg and non-veg options are available. The hostel is also very clean, and every basic need is available, like AC/Non-AC rooms with fan, light, gas for cooking, washing machines, and other essential things.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by NSHM Institute of Engineering and Technology - NSHM Knowledge Campus DurgapurReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is surrounded by nature and greenery.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi available, the classrooms are pretty decent and the library has ample amount of books. The labs are pretty good. If we talk about mess food, they have lots of variety from veg to non veg.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Swami Vivekananda Institute of Science and TechnologyReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for placement and settled in life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and playground are good. Classrooms are good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is very nice. Food quality is very good, costly but very good. All medical facilities are available, and sports and games are also there. If any student is injured, the medical facilities are top class, so students do not worry about medical treatment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Haldia Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Decent college for engineering studies.
reviews.review_text: Our department has decent classrooms, a lab, and inside our department, there is a small library which contains only departmental books. Hostel food is not that good, but it is manageable and affordable. Medical facilities are available on the campus 24/7. The gym is also available on the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Techno India UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is a well-known college in India.
reviews.review_text: The college has a small campus. It is neat, clean, and looks very beautiful. All facilities essential for studies are available, like a library, computer labs, and Wi-Fi. The college doesn't have its own hostel. PGs or flats are available near the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Heritage Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is decent for students who want normal placements at low fees.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel inside the college, but we will get a hostel outside the college. There is Wi-Fi in the library. Our campus infrastructure is also good. Bathrooms and classrooms are well-cleaned. From time to time, cleaning is done. There are so many labs for all subjects.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Bengal College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 16 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: This is a review for Bengal College of Engineering and Technology College.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the hostel, faculty members, and classes is also nice and good. The college infrastructure is neat and tidy.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Government College of Engineering and Textile Technology, BerhamporeReviewed on 16 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My college is so great, and gave me the opportunity to get introduced to the life of engineering.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and the library were available for 24 hours. The hostel facility and food were too healthy and good, and emergency medicine was available in the college and hostel. Sports and games tools were also available. Annual sports were arranged every year to keep the students active.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Greater Kolkata College of Engineering and ManagementReviewed on 14 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: We are absolutely satisfied with our college, GKCEM.
reviews.review_text: All the amenities of Greater Kolkata College of Engineering and Management (GKCEM) are wonderful. The classrooms are fully Wi-Fi enabled, and the labs and library are fully air-conditioned. Every year, the college organises sports. The hostels are very clean, and the food quality is very healthy and tasty.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Heritage Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 14 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Realistic of Heritage Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: HIT Kolkata has one of the largest campuses in Kolkata. It has a modern and well-maintained campus with good facilities like air-conditioned labs, a green environment, and noise-free areas. There is a central library with the largest collection of books, journals, etc. It has a good seating capacity, as around 250 students can sit at a time. Girl's hostel is located on the campus itself with limited seats. There is no option for male students, but there are lots of paying guests and hostels for ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Gargi Memorial Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 14 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: This college is good value for money.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good, and the facilities of the hostel are good. Food and medical facilities are provided. The food is fresh and daily-based. In the hostel, Wi-Fi facilities are available. On the campus side, the hostel is situated, and it is easy to go to the college. The hostel is maintained with good facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Calcutta Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 13 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Calcutta Institute of Technology is a very good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: This college has very good facilities and infrastructure in its classrooms. Classrooms and labs are air-conditioned. There is a huge library here too. The quality of food in the canteen is very good. Medical facilities are also provided in this college. Sports and games are also played after the semester exams.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Manipal Academy of Higher Education has been ranked #3 under the 'University'.

MAHE Manipal admissions 2026 are open. The last date to apply for UG and PG courses is Mar 15, 2026. All the latest updates are as follows:

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Manipal University are BTech and MBA. The university offers these programmes to students at UG and PG levels. These courses are offered to students in full-time mode and in several specialisations. Some of the popular specialisations offered under BTech and MBA are Mechatronics, Aeronautical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Marketing, Finance, Human Resources Management, etc.
Further, the university offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. MAHE courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at MAHE Manipal in the table provided below:

Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Manipal Academy of Higher Education in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    The University attracted over 287 recruiters for its 2025 placement session who offered a variety of job roles to the students across sectors, such as BFSI, IT, Education, FMCG, Consulting, and E-Commerce, etc. The top recruiters of Manipal University in 2025 included Ericsson, EY, Oracle, Flipkart, Adobe, Philips, Adani Group, Amazon, IBM, Samsung, SAP Labs, BOSCH India, Boeing, L&T, Cisco, Cipla, Microsoft, etc. These recruiters placed students in various sectors and offered new-age job

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
MAHE Manipal offers a wide range of programmes at UG, PG, and doctoral levels. The university offers these programmes across several specialisations such as Computer Science and Engineering, International Business, Biotechnology, Marketing, Nursing, Physics, Banking, Business Analytics, Insurance, Mechatronics, and many more.

At the UG level, the Manipal Academy of Higher Studies offers BTech, BSc, BBA, BCA, BDS, BPT, BDes, BArch, and other courses to students. At the PG level, , offers MTech,, MCA, , MS, , MPT, , MCom, , MCh, , MOptom, and other courses to students. The deemed university also offers PhD courses to students. Candidates can check the along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    MAHE Manipal courses are offered to students at the UG, PG, and PhD levels. These courses are offered in various streams such as Management, Science, Commerce, Pharmacy, Humanities, etc. Some of the popular courses offered by the university are BTech, BSc,  BDes, BPharm,  MTech, MBA, etc.
faqs.question: What are the courses offered at Manipal Academy of Higher Education?

faqs.answer: A:    Manipal Academy of Higher Education offers a BTech programme at the UG level. It is offered in full-time mode and is approved by the AICTE. The total tuition fee of BTech at MAHE Manipal ranges between INR 6.1 Lacs and INR 15 lakh.
faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee of BTech at Manipal Academy of Higher Education?

faqs.answer: A:    Applicants from any disciplinary background can apply for BCom courses at MAHE if they meet the primary criteria and can clear all the steps of MAHE's admission process and are eligible to get admission. One concern that universities ask for, candidates must complete their Class 12 with at least an aggreate of 50%, from any stream.
faqs.question: Do I need to have studied commerce to apply for B.Com at MAHE?

faqs.answer: A:    The Manipal University MET Cutoff 2025 is out for all rounds and categories for the students belonging to the All India quota. The cutoff is released in the form of ranks and is valid for admission to various engineering and medical courses at both UG and PG level. For the General AI category, the cutoff for BTech CSE ( AI and ML) course was 12751 for Manipal Institute of Technology, Bengaluru. For the BTech ECE course, the cutoff in 2025 was 15046 for the same category and college. Please note that the cutoff for each category, round, specialisation will vary.

reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with facilities.

review_content.Placements: Percentage of the students who were placed in our course was 55%. Highest package was 13 LPA, average package was 7.5 LPA, and lowest package was 4 LPA. Many reputed and big companies reached our college campus for recruitment.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are of average size and are not cleaned daily. Wi-Fi facilities are only available for faculty members. Quality of food available in mess and canteen is very hygienic and tasteless. Hostel rooms are also not comfortable. Limited sports facilities present.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Media and Communication - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with my experience in MIC.

review_content.Placements: Around 70 to 80 percent of students who sit for placements get placed, while the rest usually opt for higher studies, family businesses, freelancing or start ups. The average package range between 4 to 6 LPA, with the highest packages going up to around 10 to 12 LPA in good years, especially for marketing, branding and corporate communication roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are decent with regular cleaning, security and basic facilities. The mess food is average. Sometimes good, sometimes repetitive but there are many food options on and around campus. Medical facilities, sports grounds, gyms and student activity centers are easily accessible and well maintained.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at Manipal University?
overview_faqs.answer: The tuition fee for a four-year UG course of BTech at Manipal University ranges from INR 8.1 lakh- INR 14 lakh. It includes the fee for all BTech specialisations. Those who get direct admission to second year of BTech through Later Entry programme are required to pay between INR 9.42 Lacs - INR 13.48 lakh. However, this fee is taken from the official sources and is subjective. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Manipal University BTech fee.

overview_faqs.question: What is the entrance examination fee for admission to B.A course at Manipal Academy of Higher Education?
overview_faqs.answer: For admission to BA in Culinary Arts at Manipal Academy of Higher Education, students require a Manipal Entrance Test (MET) score. The institute conducts this entrance examination for admission to various undergraduate courses offered at Manipal Academy of Higher Education. To appear in MET, candidates are required to pay INR 1400. Entrance examination fees are different from application fees. However, both the application fees and examination fees are non-refundable.

overview_faqs.question: Is there any fee portal at Manipal University?
overview_faqs.answer: Manipal University has an online fee payment portal. The university offers one platform for candidates to check any course fees. Candidates need to visit the official website of Manipal University and click on the fee tab to access the portal. Atudents can choose the courses they want to enroll. It will redirect candidates to course fee structure page.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of Manipal University (MAHE)?
overview_faqs.answer: Though fee refund policy of MAHE is based on UGC Refund Policy, however, if students withdraw their application before 15 days of class commencement, full paid hostel fees will be refunded. If student withdraws after class commencement then INR 15000 will be deducted from hostel fee and remaining amount will be returned to student.

review_summary.college_name: Manipal University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college. It has good faculty members and facilities.

content.Placements: MSAP placements are existent but limited. It is offered to only the best students of the batch for the Bachelor of Architecture. It has a very active aluminium community that recruits students on behalf of their firms. Out of the selective group of students, a fair number of students do get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is top-notch with smartboards for education, highly equipped printing labs, 3d printing labs, VR labs, a library with all the books we need, auditoriums, work studios, a building materials lab, survey labs, good Wi-Fi, and classrooms with plenty of light, air, and charging points. Hostels are well-maintained and standard. There are both AC and non-AC rooms with attached and non-attached bathrooms, from single to triple sharing for female and male, with Wi-Fi. There are staff members for cleaning and laundry services. There are 4-5 types of mess facilities, and we can sign up for them with good, tasty, and hygienic food. Medical facilities are also available here.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued Feb(2026) B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Modern infrastructure and growing campus life but placement and facility experience is stabilizing.

content.Placements: Good placements, 80 percent people placed in 2025 placement cycle. The highest package is 69 LPA and average is 12 LPA, the lowest being 3-4 LPA. Top recruiters being Amazon, Microsoft, Bosch, Samsung, Shell. Roles offered included software engineer, data analyst, and consulting analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Amazing infrastructure and facilities. Classrooms are modern and Wi-Fi enabled with digital teaching aids such as smart-boards, projectors. Clean and well-maintained hostels. There are indoor as well as outdoor sports facilities. There is an on-campus clinic and 2 mess services with decent food.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Construction Engineering and Management - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with facilities.

content.Placements: Percentage of the students who were placed in our course was 55%. Highest package was 13 LPA, average package was 7.5 LPA, and lowest package was 4 LPA. Many reputed and big companies reached our college campus for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are of average size and are not cleaned daily. Wi-Fi facilities are only available for faculty members. Quality of food available in mess and canteen is very hygienic and tasteless. Hostel rooms are also not comfortable. Limited sports facilities present.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Media and Communication - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with my experience in MIC.

content.Placements: Around 70 to 80 percent of students who sit for placements get placed, while the rest usually opt for higher studies, family businesses, freelancing or start ups. The average package range between 4 to 6 LPA, with the highest packages going up to around 10 to 12 LPA in good years, especially for marketing, branding and corporate communication roles.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are decent with regular cleaning, security and basic facilities. The mess food is average. Sometimes good, sometimes repetitive but there are many food options on and around campus. Medical facilities, sports grounds, gyms and student activity centers are easily accessible and well maintained.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Media and Communication - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best private college.

content.Placements: The placement in our course was extremely good compared to other colleges. Around 85 percent of students were placed in our course. The average package was around 6 LPA. The starting package in our course was a little bit low. The highest package was 12 LPA. 60 percent of students received internship offers. Top recruiting companies were NDTV, Times Now, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good at a private college. Wi-Fi facility, digital classroom, and library facility were present. Hostel quality was also very good. The quality of food was also good. A multiple sports complex was present.

faqs.answer: MAHE (Manipal Academy of Higher Education) offers admission to various UG, PG, Diploma and doctoral-level programmes in the fields of Medicine, Technology, Science, Humanities, Social Science, Management, etc. Admission to a few of the courses is merit-based. For others, the entrance exam such as MET, CAT, XAT, NEET UG, etc., score is considered. The university accepts several national-level entrance exams to shortlist the candidates. Further, the mode of application at Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) is online.
faqs.question: How can I get admission in MAHE Manipal?

faqs.answer: Candidate must qualify in the NEET UG for admission to MBBS at MAHE. There is no criteria for 10th and 12th marks if the NEET UG requirement is satisfied. Candidates must take the NEET UG exam and have the eligibility criteria to appear for the exam.
faqs.question: Can I get into Manipal Academy of Higher Education if I have scored just 60% in 10th and 75% in 12th?

faqs.answer: Yes, you can surely get admission at 12th percentile of 75, as your 10+2 scores doesn't matter in the case of NEET PG admission. The needed criteria which a candidates must follow is to have MBBS degree from an institute recognised by the Medical Council of India (MCI). Such candidates must possess MBBS degree or a Provisional MBBS Pass Certificate at the time of admissions.
faqs.question: Can I get into with 75% in class 12 with NEET PG?

paragraphs: The admission process for MAHE, Manipal is a multi-stage process which consists of application, appearance in the selection rounds and counselling process. Students seeking to enrol in any of the courses offered at the university need to meet the course requirements for Manipal admission before applying. A detailed guide to theManipal University admission processis given below:
1: Manipal University Application Process

The admission process begins with filling out an online application form on the official website of Manipal University. Candidates can apply for the course of their choice along with paying an application fee ofINR 600. Apart from that, to appear for the MET exam, candidates also have to apply for the respective entrance exam and pay an application fee ofINR 1,400.
2: Manipal University Other Selection Rounds

Admission to Manipal University courses is both merit and entrance-based. For entrance-based admission, candidates must qualify for either MAHE Manipal entrance exam, i.e., MET or any other national-level entrance exams for the respective courses. Also, there are other selection rounds such as GDPI conducted as part of the selection process. For some courses, the concerned departments also conduct tests at their level. Also, direct admissions are offered to a few courses based on the candidates' merit obtained in the previous qualification. These candidates are shortlisted during the counselling process.
3: Manipal University Counselling Process/ Merit Release

Based on the scores in the respective entrance exams, past academic records and performance of candidates in other selection rounds, the university releases a merit list. Also, for direct admissions, the university conducts a counselling process based on candidates' scores obtained in the last examination.
4: Provisional Admission Notice

After the release of the merit list, a admission notice will be sent to the selected candidates. Later on, candidates can proceed with the other admission formalities such as fee payment and document verification (if required). For more details about the final admission process, candidates check the Manipal University page.

faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of Manipal University (MAHE)?
faqs.answer: Though fee refund policy of MAHE is based on UGC Refund Policy, however, if students withdraw their application before 15 days of class commencement, full paid hostel fees will be refunded. As per theManipal University NEET PG cutoff 2024, the needed rank stood between4891and196973.Wherein, the most and least competitive courses wereMD in RadiodiagnosisandMD in Physiology,respectively. With 7000 rank, it is definitely possible to get into MAHE.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to B.A at Manipal Academy of Higher Education?
faqs.answer: For admission to the BA course at Manipal Academy of Higher Education, candidates are required to either qualify on the merit list released by the institute based on candidates Class 12 scores or have valid scores in (Manipal Entrance Test) i.e., in-house entrance examination. There is a chance that Manipal Academy of Higher Education will accept direct admission to BA courses if the seats are vacant after the release of the merit list. faqs.question: When can I apply for B.A course at Manipal Academy of Higher Education?
faqs.answer: The university has not released the admission dates for 2025 batch. However, For the Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) BA programme, admission is normally available from October/November to July/August. Prior to the announcement of the final-year exam results, applications can be submitted. In addition, if the results have yet to be released, admission will be granted provisionally

faqs.answer: Manipal University offers BA (Hons) via Mahipal Centre of Humanities.Admission to MCH BA (Hons)is based on merit secured in the qualifying exam and personal essay submitted by the candidate during the application process. The shortlisted candidates are then invited for the personal interview round.

faqs.question: Is MBA available in Manipal University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Manipal University provides PG-level course of MBA (General) for a duration of two-years. The university also offers MBA in four other specialisations. These MBA courses are taught at the Department of T A Pai Institute of Management (TAPMI), Manipal. Find below the list of Manipal University MBA specialisations:Banking and Financial ServicesHuman Resource ManagementMarketingInterested candidates can apply forMBAat Manipal University via qualifying any national-level entrance such as CAT, XAT, GMAT, NMAT. Admissions to MBA are also offered to international students.Find here, the detailed Manipal University admission process for MBA course.

faqs.question: What are the key academic programmes offered by Manipal University (MAHE)?
faqs.answer: Manipal University offers courses across several fields, such as medical, engineering, science, law, arts, management, commerce, etc. Admission to most of the courses are done on the basis of entrance exam scores, followed by the other selection rounds, such as personal interview. Students can check out the following list to know about the key academic programmes offered at Manipal University:BTechB.ArchBScBHMMBBSBDSBScBComBALLBMTechMSc

faqs.question: Does Manipal University offer direct admission for MBA (without any entrance exam)?
faqs.answer: No, Manipal University does not provide direct admission for MBA. Admission to MBA at Manipal University is completely entrance-based. Aspirants need to qualify for any one of the All India Management entrance exams for admission to MBA course. Candidates can either qualify for CAT/ XAT/ NMAT/ GMAT in order to get admission. Before sitting for the exam, interested candidates have to fill an online application form for the respective entrance exams. Check out the following links for the step-wise application process for CAT & XAT entrance exams:CAT Registration Process 2023XAT Registration Process 2023

faqs.question: What is the Manipal University MET Cutoff 2025?
faqs.answer: TheManipal University MET Cutoff 2025is out for all rounds and categories for the students belonging to the All India quota. The cutoff is released in the form of ranks and is valid for admission to various engineering and medical courses at both UG and PG level. For the General AI category, the cutoff for BTech CSE ( AI and ML) course was12751for Manipal Institute of Technology, Bengaluru. For the BTech ECE course, the cutoff in 2025 was15046for the same category and college.Please note that the cutoff for each category, round, specialisation will vary.

placement_report.college_name: Manipal University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Manipal University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to Manipal University ongoing placement drive 2025, The highest international and highest domestic package offered during MIT Manipal placements in 2025 stood at INR 2.19 Crore and INR 57 LPA, respectively. While, the average package stood at INR 12.31 LPA. Up till now the placement rate achieved during the 2025 placements was 77.4%. More than 287 industry giants from various sectors such as, Analytics, Consulting, FMCG, IT, Healthcare, Sales and Marketing, etc, offered a variety of jobs to its students. Manipal University also provides internship opportunities to its students. The highest internship stipend stood at INR 60,000 per month . The top recruiters included Ericsson, EY, Oracle, Flipkart, Adobe, Philips, Adani Group, Amazon, IBM, Samsung, SAP Labs, BOSCH India, Boeing, L&T, Cisco, Cipla, Microsoft , etc.

faqs.question: How much does MBBS at Manipal cost?
faqs.answer: Manipal University offers MBBS course for a duration of total five years and six months, out of which, the course is divided into the duration of four years and six months with a one-year compulsory rotatory internship. The tuition fee for MBBS at Manipal University is INR 44 lakh - INR 72.9 lakh, which depends upon the school one chooses to pursue the course from. The given fee is taken from official sources and hence, is subjective. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Manipal University MBBS fee.

description: Manipal Academy of Higher Education, Manipal cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBBS and MDS courses. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI quota. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the Manipal Academy of Higher Education NEET UG cutoff 2025, along with other exams across various courses, rounds, and categories.

MAHE offers MBBS admission via its affiliated college called KMC Manipal. The institute accepts the NEET UG exam, followed by its counselling rounds for Kasturba Medical College admission to its MBBS course. During the KMC Manipal NEET UG cutoff 2025, the last-round closing rank for the MBBS course was 31834 for the General AI category students. Similarly, the first-round closing rank for the same course stood at 40008. Below are the NEET UG first and last-round closing ranks for the students be

According to Manipal University MBBS cutoff 2025, the last round closing rank for MBBS admission was 31834 for the General AI category students. The cutoff was 36053 in 2024 for the same course, while in 2023, it was 24330. After, analysing the cutoff trends over three years, the MBBS course of KMC Manipal, affiliated with Manipal University, saw instability in its last-round closing ranks. To learn more about the rounds and category-wise Manipal cut off trends, use the filters provided below:

Manipal University accepts NEET UG ranks via KMC Manipal for admission to the MBBS courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the important NEET UG counselling dates for admission to Kasturba Medical College, Manipal, Manipal Academy of Higher Education.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view or download the year-wise NEET UG cutoff lists for admission to the MBBS course at Kasturba Medical College, Manipal, Manipal Academy of Higher Education.

Manipal University accepts several national-level entrance exams for admission to its MBA programmes. The University accepts CAT, XAT, CMAT and NMAT entrance exams for admission. Manipal University MBA cutoff 2024 will be released soon based on candidates' performance in the national-level entrance exams. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view the previous years' cutoff percentage for CAT along with other exams. During the 2023 cutoff, the MBA CAT percentile for TAPMI M

Candidates can refer to the table below to check out some of the important exam dates for CAT, XAT, MAT and NMAT, among others for Manipal University admission to the MBA courses via its affiliated colleges.
Students can check out the table below to view or download the exam-wise MBA cutoff ranks for previous years to get an idea of the cutoff trends for MBA admission.

Admission to Manipal University for MD and MS courses is done via the NEET PG examination, followed by Karnataka NEET PG counselling process. As per the Manipal University NEET PG Cutoff 2025, which was released for General category candidates under the All India quota, the cutoff in the last round closing ranks ranged from 4555 to 134480 for admission at Kasturba Medical College, Manipal.

The Manipal University NEET PG Cutoff 2025 has been released for Round 2 for the General AI category candidates waiting to enrol to the MD and MS courses. In 2024, the cutoff for the same course and category was 4891, and in 2023, it was 5534. After analysing the cutoff for the same, we can say that the competition for this course has been increasing over the years.

Manipal University NEET PG Counselling 2025 is ongoing to admission to MD and MS course specialisations. The results have been announced till Round 2 for the General AI category candidates. As per the NIRF Ranking 2025, the rank of the institute is #14 under the category Overall, #3 under University, #59 under Engineering, #19 under Research Institutions, and #5 under SDGs Institutions. At the international level, QS World Rankings 2025 has ranked the institute at #901-950 position. Manipal University is top ranked by multiple national & international ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. The article mentioned below covers all the necessary details you need if you're interested in the Manipal University rankings.

nirf.description:
Manipal University has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Manipal University's rank is #14, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Manipal University climbed 1 rank to #3 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has displayed an increasing trend in the 'Research Institutions' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Manipal University climbed 4 ranks to #19 rank in the 'Research Institutions' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is noticeable that in the 'Innovation' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Manipal University's rank is #11, the same as last year's rank in the 'Innovation' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Manipal University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) has a separate hostel section under the management of Hostel Management Committee. This committee is headed by its Chairperson. All the hostels of the University are divided into three campuses. The hostels of medical, dental and paramedical colleges at Manipal are grouped under Chief Warden, MU, Manipal Campus; the hostels of engineering, management and other colleges located at Manipal Institute of Technology complex are grouped under Chief Warden, MIT Campus; and the hostels at Mangalore Campus are grouped under Chief Warden, Mangalore Campus.

It is desirable that all students stay in the University Hostels. It is mandatory for all first year students to reside in the Hostels. However, first year students desirous of staying outside under own arrangements must submit a consent letter from their Parents duly recommended by their HOI and forward it to Director, Student Affairs for necessary permission. These students must also give their local address, contact/mobile number and subsequent changes if any to their College Office and Director, student Affairs without fail.
facilities: Labs for UG and PG training

library.description: Manipal University has 6 major central libraries: Health Sciences Library Manipal, Health Sciences Library Mangalore, MIT Library, SOC Library, WGSHA Library, and SOM Library. There are also small department level libraries in all of the institutes. MAHE strives to provide the latest and best collection of books, journals, online sources, dissertations to students for course work and research.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Squash Court, Swimming Pool

college_info.college_name: Manipal University

data.description: Manipal University faculty has expertise in their respective fields. Most of the faculty members are PhD holders and all of them are highly qualified. The faculty are a blend of academic experience and industry exposure. They meet qualification norms of regulatory bodies and stay updated by gaining relevant degrees from time to time. A large number of faculty at Manipal University have terminal qualifications.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Manipal Academy of Higher Education

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Deloitte, Amazon, Amul, Microsoft, Wipro Consumer Care and Accenture visited our college for placements.
The placements for computer science related branches like CSE, IT and CCE (computer and communication engineering) are extremely good.
College encourages students to do internship in final semester in industry and again there are plenty of companies visiting campus to hire students for internship.

Hostel accommodations are equipped with beds, study desks, wardrobes, and basic amenities, while the quality of food varies depending on the specific hostel and mess.

college_info.college_name: Manipal University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Manipal Academy of Higher Education offers scholarships to both undergraduate and postgraduate students. The institute also offers financial aid to Indian / Domestic (General Category) students.
Below are the major highlights of Manipal Academy of Higher Education:
No of Scholarships
Types of scholarships
Kalam - Pai, Freeship and Scholar Scholarships for MBBS & BDS, Merit Scholarship for Post Graduate (PG) Medical / Dental and Super Specialty Programs, etc
Waiver range
Manipal Academy of Higher Education awards 17 types of scholarships to the eligible students. Below are the detailed information regarding MAHE scholarships:
1. Kalam - Pai, Freeship and Scholar Scholarships for MBBS & BDS:
This scholarship involves 100 % waiver of course fee and hostel fee.

These scholarships are offered to students peruising MBBS from Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) at Kasturba Medical College (KMC) Manipal, Kasturba Medical College (KMC) Mangalore and Manipal TATA Medical College (MTMC) Jamshedpur, Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) at Manipal College of Dental Sciences (MCODS) Manipal & Manipal College of Dental Sciences (MCODS) Mangalore.
Below are the KALAM – PAI scholarship guidelines:
This scholarship is limited to 5 % of the General category intake, and below mentioned tables shows the total scholarship seats program-wise & campus-wise:

KMC Mangalore
MTMC Jamshedpur
MCODS Manipal
MCODS Mangalore

Kalam - Pai Scholarship for NEET 2022 All India Rank

Scholar Scholarship for NEET 2022 All India Rank
MBBS

Scholarships Criteria: Students should have scored 80% aggregate of Physics + Chemistry + Biology (as per eligibility criteria) in Class 12 from a recognised board.
2. Merit Scholarship for Post Graduate (PG) Medical / Dental and Super Specialty Programs
MAHE Manipal offers merit scholarship for the following Post Graduate (PG) and Super Speciality (SS) programmes:
Below mentioned are the scholarship criteria:
Program
Eligibility
DM
Pass in MD / DNB from required specialisation * from an Institution / University recognized by National Medical Council (NMC) / erstwhile Medical Council of India (MCI)
MD
Pass in MBBS degree from an Institution / University recognized by National Medical Council (NMC) / erstwhile Medical Council of India (MCI)
MDS India (DCI)
Pass in BDS degree from an Institution / University recognized by Dental Council of India (DCI)
MCh
Pass in MD / DNB from required specialization * from an Institution / University recognized by National Medical Council (NMC) / erstwhile Medical Council of India (MCI)
3. FREESHIP, SCHOLAR and ACHIEVER Scholarships for BTech
MAHE Manipal offers Freeship, Scholar and Achiever scholarship to meritorious BTech students at:
Scholarship Criteria:

Student should have passed with 80% aggregate of Mathematics + Physics + Optional subject (as per selection criteria) in Class 12 from the recognised Board. Also, minimum 8 CGPA & above is needed, with no backlogs in Semester 1 of BTech programme.

Freeship & Scholar Category Scholarships: This Scholarship constitutes 5 % of the GENERAL category intake for each branch and is applicable for the entire program duration, starting from 1st year of the programme.
Freeship
Scholar
MET Rank Range

Achiever Category Scholarship: This constitutes 5 % of the general category intake for each branch and is applicable at the beginning of 2nd year, 3rd year and 4th year based on the annual academic performance of the immediate previous year i.e. 1st year, 2nd year and 3rd year. No scholarship is offered based on the performance in the final year.
4. Freeship, Scholars and Achiever Scholarship for BPharm

MAHE Manipal offers Freeship, Scholar and Achiever scholarship to meritorious students admitted to the Bachelor of Pharmacy (BPharm) program at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences (MCOPS) Manipal
Scholarship Criteria
Students should have passed with 80 % in Chemistry + Physics + Biology / Mathematics in Class 12  from a recognised board.
Freeship & Scholar category Scholarships constitute 5 % of the general category intake and is applicable for the entire programme duration, starting from 1st year of the programme.

Achiever category Scholarship constitute 5 % of the general category intake (excluding Freeship & Scholar scholarship students) and is applicable from the beginning of 2nd year, 3rd year and 4th year which is based on the annual academic performance in the immediate previous year which include 1st year, 2nd year and 3rd year. No scholarship is offered based on the performance in the final year.

college_info.intro:
GD Goenka University comprises more than 9 constituent schools and departments, including the School of Engineering & Sciences, the School of Management, and the School of Liberal Arts, among others. These schools extend a wide range of courses at the UG, PG, and PhD levels, across various streams. Among these courses the GD Goenka MBA and BTech are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
GD Goenka University Gurugram offers a full-time, two-year MBA programme at the PG level. The MBA programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Marketing, HR, International Business, etc. during the first year. While in the second year, the university extends various major and minor specialisation options to students. Students also have the option to pursue their MBA degree with an additional specialisation in either Fintech or Business Analytics.
The GD Goenka BTech programme offered by GD Goenka University is a four-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, etc. Check out the below video to know all about BTech at GD Goenka University:
Interested students can learn more about the other popular courses at GD Goenka University Gurgaon below:

review_summary.college_name: GD Goenka University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am very glad to take admission in such a good university.

content.Placements: I don't know more about placement because last year I took admission here. But I heard from our seniors that placement depends on the student's results, and top companies participate here. All students get internships in special hospitals like Fortis and Medanta. It provides very good facilities by the university.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the building is well-built and of high-quality labs. Classrooms are digital. Library is very well furnished, and all books are available here. The quality of hostel is like a 5 star hostel, and medical facilities are also available. Food quality at hostel is very excellent.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: GD Goenka University is a good private college recognized by UGC, BCI, ICAR, PCI, and NAAC.

content.Placements: About 70% to 80% of students in our M.Pharm course get placed. The highest package is 18–20 LPA, the lowest is 3–7 LPA, and the average is 10–12 LPA. Recruiting companies include Medanta, Sun Pharma, Fortis, GRC Healthcare, and others. Around 80% of students get internships at Sun Pharma, like Regulatory Affairs and QA/QC.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, pharmaceutical labs, library, CIL labs, machine room, gym, cafeteria, swimming pool, football ground, archery room, badminton rooms, table tennis court, lawn tennis court, pool room, steam and spa rooms are all available. The quality of the food is amazing. There is centralized AC, a study room, a common room, a fridge, Wi-Fi, a smart TV, and hygienic washrooms in every room. Medical facilities are available 24/7.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Optometry - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with it. Students must visit the university.

content.Placements: Around 70-80% of students get placements. The package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Lenskart and Indira Gandhi Eye Hospital. 100% of students got internships from Indira Gandhi Eye Hospital, Dayal Eye Centre, and Ahooja Eye Hospital. In our course, mostly, roles are offered to all students.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available for students like a peaceful library, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The infrastructure is very attractive and unique from other universities. The hostel is similar to the classroom building. It has all facilities in the hostel like Wi-Fi, mess food, and all these things are very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Medical Radiology and Imaging Technology (BMRIT) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my college.

content.Placements: The placement was really not good. You had to work on yourself for your placement. Only 10% of students got placed through the university. By teacher referrals, they also provided internships. Overall, the system or university was good if you could work hard on yourself.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members were good. The library was well-maintained, and medical facilities were also good. Sports facilities were also good. You could participate in any co-curricular activities, as all were conducted by the university. The university environment was good for improving your personal growth.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) by NVIDIA Deep Learning Institute (DLI) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The facility is good, the environment, and facilities are good. All is good.

content.Placements: It is based on the person and no one on our campus is out for jobs. Top roles offered are like manager, HRO, and high- to low-paid jobs. IBM, Tata, TCS, and some others visit. Maybe 75% are placed in the course. I think. The higher package is 25 LPA and the lower package is 5 LPA, based on students.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and library are good. Food is mostly North Indian, somewhat nice, and desserts are really tasty. All facilities are excellent. Wi-Fi provides personal access, and daily cleaning of rooms and washrooms, It provides good service in a hostel-like, home-environment.

admission_overview.title: GD Goenka University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Goenka University admission 2026 is based on the entrance exam. The university offers more than 20 courses including PhD courses under the schools, i.e., School of Engineering and Science, Law, Agricultural Science etc. GD Goenka admission is merit-based and accepts CUET scores for all UG and PG courses. GD Goenka University also accepts national-level entrance exams such as MAT/CAT/CMAT for admission to MBA courses. Furthermore, the institute has introduced the Center of Excellence Occupational Health, Safety, Fire and Environment. The university also accepts national-level exams such as the JEE Main/ GD Goenka Test for BTech programme.

paragraphs: GD Goenka University admissionsare entrance-based for the majority of the programmes. Students who are interested in taking admission for at GD Goenka University can check the points mentioned below:
1. Application Process

The admission process starts with filling GD Goenka University application form. Interested candidates can visit the official website to apply for the course of their choice along with making the fee payment of INR 1,100 for all courses.
2. Selection Process
For MBA courses candidates need to clear CAT/ CMAT/ MAT/ CUET/GD Goenka Test and fulfil of latest eligibility, i.e., class 12. However, for the BTech programme, students need to clear JEE (Main).
3. Admission Confirmation

After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to payGD Goenka University course feeto confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.answer: The university has designed multiple eligibility as per course requirement. To get admission for various courses the candidate have to meet the last educational qualifications. faqs.question: Is it hard to get admission to GD Goenka University?
faqs.answer: GD Goenka University admission to a majority of undergraduate and postgraduate courses is based on marks scored in Goenkan Aptitude Test for Admission (GATA) followed by Personal Interview (PI) round. Other national-level entrance exams accepted include CUET, CUET-PG, JEE Main, MAT, UID Design Aptitude Test, etc. For candidates who fulfil the eligibility criteria and who have prepared well, it is not hard to get admission at GD Goenka University.

faqs.question: How can I take admission at GD Goenka University?
faqs.answer: Goenka University admission 2026is based on the entrance exam. The university offers more than 20 courses including PhD courses under the schools, i.e.,School of Engineering and Science, Law, Agricultural Science etc. GD Goenka admission is merit-based and accepts CUET scores for all UG and PG courses.

placement_data.title: GD Goenka University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Over 300 companies took part during the GD Goenka University placements. The top recruiters were EY, KPMG, PWC, Protiviti and many others participated during the placement drive.

At GD Goenka University , the Corporate Resource Center (CRC) offers skill development programs. These programmes make students ready for the professional world. The center provides 100% placement assistance to students. The institute has a strong relationship with leading companies to provide employment to students in and outside India. Trainings are conducted for successful placements such as mock interviews, pre placement briefings and personality development programmes. The CRC has a one student, one job policy to make sure every student has a job when they graduate.
Refer to the CRC activities listed below:
1. Student Centric Active Learning Workshop
4. Resume building workshop

faqs.question: What is the duration of the BA course at GD Goenka University?
faqs.answer: The BA (Hons.) programme is a four-year full-time course offered by the GD Goenka university. The university provides a BA (Hons.) programme in three specialisations, following a semester pattern. Candidate selection is based on a combination of merit and the entrance exam. All applications must be submitted before the BA admissions deadline at GD Goenka University.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for the BCom programme at GD Goenka University?
faqs.answer: The application fee for the BCom programme at GD Goenka University is INR 1,000 for all applicants, and applications can be submitted online or offline.

nirf.description:
GD Goenka University has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Pharmacy' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for GD Goenka University indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, GD Goenka University climbed 11 ranks to #90 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: GD Goenka University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: GD Goenka University hostels provides around 500 rooms which are shared by undergraduate and postgraduate students. The hostel provides common room which ]can be shared by 4 or 8 students which has the facility of LCD T.V and refrigerator.
facilities: Visit the admission portal of UID at uid.edu.in/admission/.

library.description:
GDGU Library and Information Centre consists a Reference Section, Circulation Section, Audio-visual Section, Periodical Section, Book Bank and Digital Library. It has automated all its library activities through Library Software to provide the effective and wide range of academic resources such as books, journals, online databases, DVDs, CD-ROMs, e-journals and other useful materials.
Library has Institutional Memberships of DELNET, Shodhganga (INFLIBNET) and many more. The library is subscribing more than 29450 e-journals and magazines National and International in full-text through the online databases especially for the academic and research needs of the GDGU academic community.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Squash Court, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Olympic Size 400 mts 8 Lane Athletic Tracks, Spa Facility, Table Tennis Tables
