review_summary.college_name: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is best for study, placement and facilities aur also good.

content.Placements: There are 90% of students who were placed in the B.Tech course this year. The highest package is 40 LPA, and the lowest package is 6 LPA in top companies like Swaraj, Mahindra, and Robbins.
content.Infrastructure: This is the best university in Dehradun, and the facilities are very good. The infrastructure of the college is good, with a 24-hour library, very good labs, classrooms, and facilities. Teaching quality is also very good, with approximately 6-7 years of experience. The hostel is also good, with very good rooms and food. Every year, they organise sports tournaments.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and facilities.

content.Placements: I will complete B.Tech in Computer Science (2025-2029). Around 75-80% students are placed. The highest package is about 20 LPA, the lowest 3 LPA, and the average is 6-7 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Accenture. About 60% got internships as developers or analysts.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, good Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean with basic facilities, decent food in the mess and canteen. Medical support on campus, and good sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University review.

content.Placements: The bulk of hiring comes from mass recruiters like TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, and Infosys. If you have decent grades (no backlogs) and basic coding skills, you will likely get placed in one of these. The college does not hand hold you for internships. You have to be proactive and find them yourself, though they might help with the paperwork.
content.Infrastructure: The campus looks good from the outside. The computer labs are generally functional with working systems. A common complaint is Wi-Fi: while they claim campus-wide Wi-Fi, the speed and connectivity in hostel and certain blocks can be spotty. Hostels are decent and clean enough in the budget range. I will suggest to take PG outside.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, active campus life, and decent placements with growth.

content.Placements: Around 85% students got placed. The highest package is 18 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Accenture. About 70% got internships. Roles offered are Software Engineer, Analyst, and Developer, good for the students who have come.
content.Infrastructure: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. Hostels are clean and secure. Mess food is hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical support, sports grounds, and indoor games facilities are provided wifiij.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: More focus on social media and digital marketing.

content.Placements: The CEO of my college is around 30 to 40% per year, depending on their strength and the skills they have gained during the academic sessions. With the help of psychology and extracurricular activities, they have secured placements in very reputable companies.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, the infrastructure is very well-furnished, and their main focus is on theoretical knowledge, similar to what we experience in regular schools. There is a lack of sports infrastructure, which is something a student should have to relieve mental stress during their studying period.

admission_overview.college_name: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Admission 2025: Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Selection and Application form

admission_process.title: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University admission 2025is conducted in both online and offline modes. Candidates near the University can visit the campus and purchase the application form from the admission office. Aspirants willing to apply online must visit the University's official website. Admissions to the programmes offered atDBUUare done on a merit basis for all courses. The university shortlists the candidates based on their merit in the qualifying exam. Students seeking to get admission to the courses offered at the university can refer to the following article to learn the detailedadmission procedure for Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University.

TheDBUU admission criteriaare merit-based for most of its courses. Candidates willing to take admission can apply online or offline. Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University offers more than thirty undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral and diploma courses. The university accepts students for its BAMS programme based on NEET scores. The courses are offered via its ten constituent schools in different streams such as Nursing,Engineeringand Technology, Arts,Commerce, etc. Interested candidates can check out the table below for topDBBU courses:

TheDev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University admission processis a multi-step process that begins with the release of the application forms and ends with the submission of admission confirmation fees by the selected candidates. The step-wiseDBUU admission processis given below:
Step 1: DBUU Application Process 2025
The application process is conducted in online and offline modes. Interested candidates can apply for admission either by visiting the official website of the university or the college campus.
Step 2: Shortlisting of candidates
The candidates are shortlisted based on the merit secured in the qualifying exam.
Step 3: Result declaration and Admission Confirmation
The University releases a merit list on the official website. Selected candidates are required to pay the admission confirmation fees to book their seats.

faqs.question: How to apply for BPharm admission at DBUU?
faqs.answer: Dev Bhoomi University BPharm application process is conducted online and offline. To apply in the offline mode, aspirants can visit the university campus and purchase the application form. For online application, they can follow the below-given steps:Step 1:Visit the official website of the University.Step 2:Click on 'Admissions' on the taskbar of the homepage and select the 'Apply now' option from the drop-down.Step 3:On the redirected page, fill out the registration form using a valid email ID and phone number.Step 4:Log in using the credentials generated in the previous step and fill out the application form.Step 5:Pay the application fee of INR 1,500 and click on submit.

paragraphs: Dev Bhoomi Uttrakhand University placement cell also known as the Corporate Resource Centre plays an important role in placing students fromm all courses. So far, more than 15,500 offers have been provided to students over the years. The placement rate achieved during DBUU placements 2025 was 80%. The highest and average package recorded during the placements was INR 43 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively. Companies like Jaro Education, TCS, Intellipaat, Zscaler and many more were part of the placement season.

highlights.description: DBUU is one of India’s top institutes. hostel_campus.college_name: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: This college is best for study, placement and facilities aur also good.
reviews.review_text: This is the best university in Dehradun, and the facilities are very good. The infrastructure of the college is good, with a 24-hour library, very good labs, classrooms, and facilities. Teaching quality is also very good, with approximately 6-7 years of experience. The hostel is also good, with very good rooms and food. Every year, they organise sports tournaments.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, good Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean with basic facilities, decent food in the mess and canteen. Medical support on campus, and good sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University review.
reviews.review_text: The campus looks good from the outside. The computer labs are generally functional with working systems. A common complaint is Wi-Fi: while they claim campus-wide Wi-Fi, the speed and connectivity in hostel and certain blocks can be spotty. Hostels are decent and clean enough in the budget range. I will suggest to take PG outside.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, active campus life, and decent placements with growth.
reviews.review_text: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. Hostels are clean and secure. Mess food is hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical support, sports grounds, and indoor games facilities are provided wifiij.

reviews.review_heading: More focus on social media and digital marketing.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the infrastructure is very well-furnished, and their main focus is on theoretical knowledge, similar to what we experience in regular schools. There is a lack of sports infrastructure, which is something a student should have to relieve mental stress during their studying period.

reviews.review_heading: College makes more interest in events and several activities. The teaching quality is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi works average many times. Labs are average. Classrooms are also good. The library is average. The facilities in the hostel are average. The food is average, and the canteen is open from 10 AM to 9 PM. The hostel provides medical support if there is a serious illness, and they also have ambulance service for students. There are many events for sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My college is budget-friendly.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is mainly for the HOD curriculum, and there is a lack of sports facilities. However, if you talk about studies, proper management and facilities for the students and their future, the college infrastructure is good for the students who mainly focus on academics. Nevertheless, it lacks in providing that benefit for students who focus on extracurricular activities like sports and other pursuits.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Decent infrastructure, decent campus life. Average placements.
reviews.review_text: The facility and infrastructure available for the course are decent. Wi-Fi is rather slow but okay. There is a library at the top. Classrooms contain projectors with whiteboards. Some contain smart boards. The quality of food available in the mess is not so good, but okay. There are vending machines in every hostel, so you don't have to go to the canteen. The canteen contains good quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: All in all, DBUU can be a good choice.
reviews.review_text: Here we are provided with two tables, as the room is a 2-seater, and you can choose the number of seats you want. There are two beds, one almirah, and an attached room with a commode and basin. The cleaners come every day to clean the room, and on Sundays, the washrooms are cleaned. The hostel with a three-seater non-attached washrooms room is 80,000, and the 2-seater with attached washrooms is 110,000 with a 5,000 registration fee. I would suggest taking a PG or rented apartment; it will cost h...

reviews.review_heading: School-like college, uniform-wala college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working anywhere in the labs. The labs are good enough for students to train for themselves, and faculty train them for the industry. Hostel food is very hygienic, but the taste of the food is not that good. The food is only good and tasty at the time of admission.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in budget, a school like college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working properly on our campus, it's not connecting well. The labs are well maintained and very good, the classrooms are very good, the capacity of students is above 100, and the library is good enough for studying. The librarian is strict about noise. Hostel food is good, but not that hygienic. Safety concerns are always at the top for food.

reviews.review_heading: MBA experience that feels practical but self-driven.
reviews.review_text: The campus is green and good, which helps when MBA work becomes hard. Classrooms are suitable for presentations and group discussions. The internet works for normal use, but is inconsistent at times. The library is decent for reference and exam preparation. Hostel life is simple and disciplined. Rooms are clean, but facilities are basic. Mess food is average and repetitive, so most students don't expect much variety. Overall, the environment is functional rather than luxurious.

reviews.review_heading: The MBA course here is more about efforts than hype.
reviews.review_text: The campus is quiet and away from the city, which helps us to focus on our studies. MBA classrooms are comfortable and suitable for presentations and group discussions. The internet is available but not always reliable for heavy work. The library is useful mainly during exams and project submissions. Hostels are basic but livable, with regular cleaning. Mess food is simple and repetitive, so many students prefer canteen food or outside options occasionally.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Architecture and Design, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 24 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students who are seeking a design course.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are clean. Hostel rooms are good with Wi-Fi, though there is no Wi-Fi in classrooms. Clean food is provided in the mess and canteens. Vending machines are available for late-night cravings. There is a 24/7 water and electricity supply for uninterrupted study sessions. Laundry facilities are available, and washing machines are also provided in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 20 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best emerging university in Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi does not work properly. Classrooms are like a school. The library is very brilliant in our college. In the hostel, electricity is not constant. The mess food is not hygienic, and it is average. It has average medical facilities. Doctors are also not available on time, and a doctor is not that well-qualified.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Hindi - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the best university for M.A. in Hindi course.

review_content.Placements: Almost 95% of students got placed in our university. Very good bundles are available, all with the core firm. The maximum is 26 LPA, while the minimum is 6 LPA. The average compensation package is 17 LPA. Charishma, MM Enterprises, Michael Page, and other top recruiting companies are listed below. All students are assigned positions such as content writers, translator, etc. Approximately 92% of students receive internship opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our university features modern labs, classrooms with Wi-Fi, and libraries that are well-stocked for every course. Large rooms, Wi-Fi, and recreational amenities are features of hotels. The mess food has a variety of options and is good. Munchies are served in our restaurants. There is a clinic that is open continuously. A gym, basketball, football, and cricket are among the sports facilities. All things considered, the buildings are kept up nicely and are convenient for students to access.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It has good return on investment but the facilities could be improved more.

review_content.Placements: 95% of students got placed for 2023-2025 batch. The highest package is 12 LPA. The lowest salary is 4.5 LPA. The average package is 7 LPA. Top recruiters are TVS Motors, IDBI Bank, HDFC Bank, ITC, Reliance Consumer Products, Dalmia Cements, and others. 100% of the batch got internships in companies like Marico, ITC, NRL Refinery, Oil India, Amul, Coca-Cola, Kantar, etc. Mostly only sales roles are offered, with only few finance and HR roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are provided like Wi-Fi, classrooms, computer lab, and library. Hostel and mess facilities are also provided along with recreational activities like sports both indoor and outdoor, cafes, and restaurants. It also has medical center where check-ups and medicine are provided free of cost.

review_summary.college_name: Tezpur University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Hindi - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is the best university for the M.A. in Hindi course.

content.Placements: Nearly 96% of the pupils feel at ease in my branch. The maximum salary offered is 30 LPA. At least 6 LPA is required. Packages range from 15 to 21 LPA on average. Students get placed at Randstad India, Monster India, Naukri.com, and others. Positions include roles such as government officer, literary critic, and more. College students receive good support for internships.
content.Infrastructure: The amenities are excellent, equipped with all the latest comforts. There is Wi-Fi on the campus and in the hostel rooms. The hostel offers great rooms with high-quality timber furnishings and beautiful paintings. There are also good computer labs. In Assam, having good transportation is essential, and the college provides that. Both North Indian and South Indian food at the canteen, and both are excellent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is not as bad as people might think.

content.Placements: While the placement cell itself might not be the best, it doesn't hold back students from landing great offers. This year (2025 batch), 8 students from the ECE branch land PSU placements of 12.5–13 LPA. Previously as well, CSE students land jobs up to 37 LPA, and many score well in GATE exams and go abroad for further studies.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are pretty good compared to other government institutions. Classrooms have the required facilities, although not all of them. The campus Wi-Fi works in certain areas but isn't very dependable. The mess food is also quite decent. Sports facilities are available and quite active.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Hindi - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best university for M.A. in Hindi course.

content.Placements: Almost 95% of students got placed in our university. Very good bundles are available, all with the core firm. The maximum is 26 LPA, while the minimum is 6 LPA. The average compensation package is 17 LPA. Charishma, MM Enterprises, Michael Page, and other top recruiting companies are listed below. All students are assigned positions such as content writers, translator, etc. Approximately 92% of students receive internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Our university features modern labs, classrooms with Wi-Fi, and libraries that are well-stocked for every course. Large rooms, Wi-Fi, and recreational amenities are features of hotels. The mess food has a variety of options and is good. Munchies are served in our restaurants. There is a clinic that is open continuously. A gym, basketball, football, and cricket are among the sports facilities. All things considered, the buildings are kept up nicely and are convenient for students to access.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has good return on investment but the facilities could be improved more.

content.Placements: 95% of students got placed for 2023-2025 batch. The highest package is 12 LPA. The lowest salary is 4.5 LPA. The average package is 7 LPA. Top recruiters are TVS Motors, IDBI Bank, HDFC Bank, ITC, Reliance Consumer Products, Dalmia Cements, and others. 100% of the batch got internships in companies like Marico, ITC, NRL Refinery, Oil India, Amul, Coca-Cola, Kantar, etc. Mostly only sales roles are offered, with only few finance and HR roles.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are provided like Wi-Fi, classrooms, computer lab, and library. Hostel and mess facilities are also provided along with recreational activities like sports both indoor and outdoor, cafes, and restaurants. It also has medical center where check-ups and medicine are provided free of cost.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overview of Tezpur University.

content.Placements: 20% of students placed till now. The highest salary offered was 6.7 LPA. L&T and Cognizant were some top recruiting companies. Almost every student got internships, especially industrial internships. The lowest paying job was offered 3.5 LPA. Top role offered was a senior engineer in Oil company.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels were in good condition and food quality was also good. Classrooms were nice. Dedicated library and reading room were there. Library facilities were top-class. Mess was very hygienic and every hostel had its own canteen. Labs were average and some were good.

Tezpur University has diversified programmes in different disciplines and through four schools, including School of Sciences, School of Management Sciences, School of Engineering, and school of Humanities and Social Sciences and has been applying a large number of entries into the university through different national-level and university-level entrance exams, like CUET-UG, TUEE, JEE-Main, CAT, etc.

paragraphs: Students can take a large number of UG, PG, diploma, doctoral, and certificate programs at Tezpur University. ODL (Open and Distance Learning) is another programmes offered by the university. The official site of the university allows interested students to enroll in the desired programme.

Tezpur university admits using different national-level and university-level entrance exams, including CUET-UG, TUEE, and JEE-Main. The eligibility and selection criteria set by the university allow the candidates to apply by completing the application form via the official website of Tezpur University. The Tezpur University admissions are as follows:
1: Tezpur University Application.

In order to join any of the programmes offered in the Tezpur University, the candidates have to fill the application form on the official site of the university with a payment of the necessary application fee to complete the final submission.
2: Selection Criteria of Tezpur University.

The admission at Tezpur university is entirely entrance examination based. The university admits candidates based on a number of national-level and university-level entrance exams, including CUET-UG, TUEE, and JEE-Main to different programmes. Shortlisting will be done to candidates with valid scores in the aforementioned exams in the counselling process.
3: Tezpur University Final Allotment.
The final admission process, i.e. document verification and payment of tuition fee to secure final seat allotment will be done after the completion of the counselling process.

Tezpur University course feesmust be paid once the admission process is completed and later semester-wise. The university's fees range fromINR 4,000toINR 1.3 lakh. The fees include multiple components, such as registration, placement brochure, alumni fees, etc., which candidates must pay during admission. Candidates must also deposit a caution deposit of INR 2000, which is refundable. Find below the course-wiseTezpur University feesand ROI:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Check:Tezpur University Fees Structure

Tezpur University seatsare allotted to candidates once they complete the entire admission process. Candidates must pay the admission fee to confirm their seat. faqs.question: Can I get admission in Tezpur University without CUET?
faqs.answer: As per the Tezpur University admission guidelines 2025, admission to most of the course is based onCUET exam.Therefore, candidates must have a valid CUET score. After having a valid score card/ rank allotted, interested candidates need to check for the merit list, which is released from the university side from their official website. Only those applicants will be eligible for further process of securing a seat in Tezpur University whose score card/ rank is as per the merit list of TU. The last step is submitting their documents and fee payment.

faqs.question: Is CUET exam registration open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Common University Entrance Test (CUET) 2026 registration commenced at cuet.nta.nic.in. NTA released the CUET 2026 notification on January 03 and reopened the window on February 23. Soon after the release of the CUET official notification, theCUET registration 2026process commenced online at the official website. Candidates willing to appear for the CUET 2026 exam must have completed complete the application form online. Additionally, before filling application form, candidates must make sure that they have fulfilled the prescribedCUET eligibility criteriato qualify for the entrance exam.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at Tezpur University. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. highlights.description: Tezpur University has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #79 in the University category by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around Tezpur University rankings:

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, Tezpur University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is to be noted that the Tezpur University's rankings in 'Overall' category have demonstrated stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Tezpur University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'University' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Tezpur University fell 10 ranks to #79 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The 'Engineering' category rankings of the institute have shown a stable trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Tezpur University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'Management' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Tezpur University fell 6 ranks to #101 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

outlook.description:
Tezpur University has been ranked well by the Outlook under the 'Central Universities' category. Through the years, the Outlook rankings for Tezpur University indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Central Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, Tezpur University's rank is #5, the same as last year's rank in the 'Central Universities' category by the Outlook ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
According to the rankings from QS World University Rankings, Tezpur University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Tezpur University's rankings in 'Asia' category have shown a decreasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2026, Tezpur University fell 110 ranks to #671 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Southern Asia' category have shown a decreasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, Tezpur University fell 36 ranks to #204 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: Tezpur University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
Tezpur University has 5 boys hostel and 7 girls hostel.All the hostels have basic amenities like water purifiers, common room, recreation room, mess, TV, laundry services, security and surveillance system etc.

The University provides separate accommodation for men and women students and research scholars, having  more  than 3700 capacity. The University also has a married research scholar’s hostel with capacity of accommodating more than 30 married research scholars.

library.description:
Central Library is the focal point of all user community of Tezpur University. The Library caters to the educational and research needs of the academic community and its resources are consulted by scholars from all over the country. Central Library has been started functioning since 1994. At present, the library holds about 83200+ books, 10000+ journals (print + online),online databases, CDs and 7848 back volumes of journals.

Library is a member of e-ShodhSindhu Consortium, DeLCON consortium and DELNET. Library users can access book database, journal database, e-journals, institutional repository, electronic thesis & dissertations and other e-resources from any terminal within the University campus. Library provides reading facility for 365 days in the year.

The library is continuously striving at to adopt the best practices in all endeavours of its activities. The library has fully computerized with the help Libsys software which is an integrated multi-user library management system that supports all in-house operations of the Library.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best university for the M.A. in Hindi course.
reviews.review_text: The amenities are excellent, equipped with all the latest comforts. There is Wi-Fi on the campus and in the hostel rooms. The hostel offers great rooms with high-quality timber furnishings and beautiful paintings. There are also good computer labs. In Assam, having good transportation is essential, and the college provides that. Both North Indian and South Indian food at the canteen, and both are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: It is not as bad as people might think.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are pretty good compared to other government institutions. Classrooms have the required facilities, although not all of them. The campus Wi-Fi works in certain areas but isn't very dependable. The mess food is also quite decent. Sports facilities are available and quite active.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best university for M.A. in Hindi course.
reviews.review_text: Our university features modern labs, classrooms with Wi-Fi, and libraries that are well-stocked for every course. Large rooms, Wi-Fi, and recreational amenities are features of hotels. The mess food has a variety of options and is good. Munchies are served in our restaurants. There is a clinic that is open continuously. A gym, basketball, football, and cricket are among the sports facilities. All things considered, the buildings are kept up nicely and are convenient for students to access.

reviews.review_heading: It has good return on investment but the facilities could be improved more.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are provided like Wi-Fi, classrooms, computer lab, and library. Hostel and mess facilities are also provided along with recreational activities like sports both indoor and outdoor, cafes, and restaurants. It also has medical center where check-ups and medicine are provided free of cost.

reviews.review_heading: Overview of Tezpur University.
reviews.review_text: Hostels were in good condition and food quality was also good. Classrooms were nice. Dedicated library and reading room were there. Library facilities were top-class. Mess was very hygienic and every hostel had its own canteen. Labs were average and some were good.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Tezpur University. Beautiful Campus, one of the best in India.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college and department is very good. Classrooms are well-built and structured. There are many labs with a maximum capacity of around 80 students at a time. AC rooms are also available, all around the university. Wi-Fi is available and with good connection, in every hostel, you will find Wi-Fi with good connectivity. There are 7 men and 8 women hostel in our university. Hostel rooms are well built and with good facilities. Mess food quality is very good and it is tasty. Canteen ...

reviews.review_heading: Well-Qualified Faculty, Industry-Relevant Curriculum, and Vibrant Campus Life.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library with good equipment, which enhances the academic environment. The quality of the facilities in my hostel and other hostels is good. Food is also nice, and all the facilities like medical, canteen, sports, and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and best facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a private bank facility such as Wi-Fi on campus with high speed, and the classrooms are well maintained and clean. The hostel rooms are fine; they really adhere to protocols and rules, especially for girls. The food in the hostel is good, and there are many games we can play. The mess provides good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Exploring Tezpur University .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Tezpur University is by far the best in the way. It is the 3rd most ranked university in the Northeast. Of course it has good hostels and playgrounds, swimming pool, yoga center, computer center, gym, central library, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life is good, and you will have plenty of free time to prepare for any competitive exam.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are clean and well-ventilated. Labs are well-equipped with all the necessary instruments for experiments. Hostels are also clean, and the rooms are pretty good. Each hostel has its own canteen, which stays open until 2 AM, and campus Wi-Fi is accessible.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, facilities etc.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course/department are very good there were smart classrooms where monitors are present and AC, fan, etc. The classroom also has AC, fan, etc. The library is very huge one of the largest libraries at Tezpur University.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best north-east college ever and the infrastructure and facilities are really good.
reviews.review_text: Tezpur University has well-developed hostel facilities for its students. There are a total of 11 hostels on campus, which provide accommodation for both undergraduate and postgraduate students. The hostels are divided into separate blocks for male and female students. Each hostel has its own mess facility, providing affordable and nutritious meals. The rooms are well-furnished with basic amenities like beds, study tables, and cupboards. The hostels also have common rooms with television sets, an...

reviews.review_heading: Tezpur University, The most peaceful place.
reviews.review_text: On campus, there are four schools included in TU: the School of Science, the School of Management, the School of Humanities and Social Science, and the School of Engineering. All schools share some common grounds, which have facilities for football, cricket, kabaddi, volleyball, and basketball courts, with engineering students dominating the area. The food quality in the canteen and hostel is a matter of concern. Wi-Fi connectivity is limited, with very low speeds, around 50 kbps. Monkeys on cam...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities in our area are good. Wi-Fi, lab equipment, classroom infrastructure and a library—all kinds of facilities in our college are of good quality. The food available in our hostel mess and canteen is really good. Other activities, like sports and games, are also encouraged in our college .

reviews.review_heading: Average college with very beautiful campus!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available on the entire campus is magnificent. However, currently, the institution does not have an electrical department available. But the rest of the academic facilities are very well maintained and provided for students. Classrooms are provided with smart projectors and digital screens. The library is good enough, with a collection of around 20,000+ books and journals. Wi-Fi is also provided on the library campus. Hostels are quite good, as most of the hostels here are ele...

highlights.summary:
The TANCET 2026 application form is live until Apr 10, 2026, for Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International School of Textiles and Management admission to the MBA course. Also, the TANCET exam 2026 is scheduled for May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel include BBA and MBA. For the BBA course, students must have passed Class 12 or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ PwD/ OBC-NCL/ EWS).
For MBA, students must have graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for OBC-NCL/ EWS and 40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ PwD). Check the popular programmes offered at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel College in the following table:

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International School of Textiles and Management offers courses at UG and PG levels in multiple streams such as Management, Commerce, Science, etc. Interested candidates can apply online for their preferred course.

SVPISTM offers UG and PG courses in full-time mode. Candidates can check the Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International School of Textiles and Management conducts SVPET in online mode to shortlist candidates for admission. The test is conducted for one hour duration having 50 MCQs. The exam includes Data Interpretation, English, Analytical Skills, Resoning, etc. Besides, the institute also accepts CUET-UG and CUET-PG scores for admission.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International School of Textiles and Management?

faqs.answer: A:    Aspirants need to complete graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for OBC-NCL/ EWS and 40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ PwD) to apply for Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International School of Textiles and Management MBA course. Candidate who have appeared for any examination and whose result has not been declared at the time of admission, shall be eligible to apply for MBA course.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at SVPISTM?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates need to complete Class 12 or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate to apply for BBA course of Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International School of Textiles and Management. There is 5% relaxation in the aggregate for SC/ ST/ PwD/ OBC-NCL/ EWS candidates. Hence, aspirants with 60% in Class 12 can apply for BBA course.
faqs.question: Can I apply for SVPISTM BBA with 60% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates after completion of the selection process need to carry original documents for verification. Below are the documents required at the time of admission at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International School of Textiles and Management:SSLC certificate (for both UG and PG aspirants)HSC certificate (for both UG and PG aspirants)Semester-wise marksheets (for MBA candidate only)Provisional Certificate, UG Consolidated marksheet (for MBA candidate only)Degree Certificate (for MBA candidate only)Community certificate (for BC/SC/ST candidate)Economically Weaker Section certificate (for EWS candidate)Disability certificate (for PWD candidate)Aadhaar cardPhotograph (3 nos.)Transaction details of the first semester payment
faqs.question: What documents do I need to carry for verification at SVPISTM?

reviews_list.batch_info: MBA in Apparel Management - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, friendly faculty, lenient and average placements.

review_content.Placements: My batchmates were placed in reputed companies. 75% students were placed in my batch. The salary package ranges between 15000 to 30000. Vardhaman, Aditya Birla, NTC Mills, Synthesis, KPM Mills, SP Apparel, SCM, etc. If it is an apparel company, then the postings are like merchandiser, quality controller, HR, marketing manager and designer and if it is a mill, then it differs. There is a condition that every student must do the internship on the placed companies and if so not placed then placement cell offers internship companies. Though we are going as a trainee to the placed companies, mostly there is no stipend but some students are offered minimum 5000/month.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Technical Textiles - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an underrated central government college.

content.Placements: We are the 1st batch of the course. Almost 90% of students got placed in our college. Top roles offered are industrial engineer, supervisor, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides us with all the facilities. We have labs for textile chemical processing, textile testing, technical textile, weaving, knitting, garment construction, and stitching. The hostel facility is available for girls. The food served in the hostel is average.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are highly talented and friendly. The course curriculum is relevant. It makes students industry-ready. Semester exams can be cleared if you listen to the classes. The pass percentage is 40%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Textiles and Apparel - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International School of Textiles and Management.

content.Placements: More than 70% of students got placed in our course. Tommy Hilfiger, Levi's, and Aditya Birla are the top recruiting companies. Almost 30-40% of students got internships in various companies. Merchandiser, quality controller, etc., are the top roles offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel for boys, and our campus is not Wi-Fi-enabled. But the hostel has a Wi-Fi facility. Laboratory does not have any modern machinery. Library and classrooms are well-maintained. Mess and canteen facilities are better. Sports and games are not good in our college.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Textile Business Analytics - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely the best college in India.

content.Placements: It is a good future course. Nowadays, textile and fashion industries are at their peak. Ramon, Aravind, and Gokuldas are recruiting. 50% for placing in good companies. HR and planner are roles in the course. Nowadays, textile and fashion industries offer high-value jobs and future prospects.

admission_overview.college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel College Admission 2025: Fee, Eligibility, Application & Selection

paragraphs: SVPISTM Coimbatore admissionsare entrance-based. The institute accepts CUET-UG and CUET-PG scores for admission to specific courses. SVPISTM also take an entrance test-SVPET for admission to UG and PG courses.Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International School of Textiles and Managementgives courses at UG and PG levels in distinct streams such as Management, Commerce, Science, etc. Interested candidates can apply online for their preferred course.

SVPISTM offers UG and PG courses in full-time mode. Candidates need to meet course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for a course. Below areSVPISTM coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Download:SVPISTM Prospectus 2025,SVPISTM Brochure 2025

SVPISTM offers admission to courses based on national or university-level entrance exams. Candidates need to fulfil both eligibility and selection requirements to get admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in SVPISTM:
STEP 1: SVPISTM Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Aspirants can download and fill the form available on the institute website. Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 500 to register for a course. Candidates belonging to SC/ ST/ PWD category are exempted from paying the application fee.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute conducts SVPET for shortlisting candidates for UG and PG admission. SVP Entrance Test is an online test conducted for one-hour duration. The test includes 50 MCQs for both UG and PG courses. Aspirants can also get admission to UG and PG courses based on CUET-UG and CUET-PG scores, respectively.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the candidates are selected, they need to submit the specified documents for verification. They need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: Can I apply for SVPISTM BBA with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete Class 12 or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate to apply for BBA course of Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International School of Textiles and Management. faqs.answer: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International School of Textiles and Management shortlists candidates for BBA course based on CUET-UG or SVPET score. The syllabus for SVPET for UG courses includes English, Numerical Aptitude/ Data Interpretation, Analytical Skills, Reasoning, General Aptitude and General Knowledge.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at SVPISTM?

The test is conducted for one hour duration having 50 MCQs. The exam includes Data Interpretation, English, Analytical Skills, Resoning, etc. Besides, the institute also accepts CUET-UG and CUET-PG scores for admission.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at SVPISTM?
faqs.answer: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International School of Textiles and Management admissions are currently open. Candidates can download the application form from the official website of the institute. Aspirants after filling the application form can appear for SVPET conducted by the institute. In case of CUET-UG or CUET-PG scores, aspirants will be exempted from appearing for SVPET.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in SVPISTM?

library.description: Well-equipped library with a large collection of books on textile and management oriented subjects. WEBOPAC facility is available for browsing all the database of the library. labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Physics Lab, Fashion Lab, Textile Lab

reviews.review_heading: It is an underrated central government college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all the facilities. We have labs for textile chemical processing, textile testing, technical textile, weaving, knitting, garment construction, and stitching. The hostel facility is available for girls. The food served in the hostel is average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International School of Textiles and Management.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel for boys, and our campus is not Wi-Fi-enabled. But the hostel has a Wi-Fi facility. Laboratory does not have any modern machinery. Library and classrooms are well-maintained. Mess and canteen facilities are better. Sports and games are not good in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, friendly faculty, lenient and average placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college is a Wi-Fi campus and we have computer labs and textile labs are emerging but college doesn't give importance to sports and games. There are no medical facilities provided. We are blessed with smart classrooms and AC labs. Not so good food is provided in canteens and mess which is for hostel students. But hostel rooms and facilities are good. Though I am a day scholar, there are no issues I faced because of the food or any infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are good in this central government college.
reviews.review_text:
Equipped with 24 hrs wifi facility throughout the college.
The library is good with journals, e-subscriptions for the students.
The quality of the food is good.
Hostel facility is available for both boys and girls.
Equipped with auditorium inside the campus.
Hostel rooms are fine with wifi, washing machine facility etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best college in India.
reviews.review_text: Good classrooms and library, small sports area need improvement, poor Wi-Fi, bad canteen, food is not good. Better to change catering. Limited students and staff. Friendly librarians, events, and cultural programs are good. There are only two departments: Fashion Technology and MBA.

college_info.intro:
Kalyani University offers a range of courses in fields like Arts, Science, Commerce, Fine Arts, Engineering, etc. Ug level courses are offered for 3 or 4 years. Similarly, PG programmes are offered for a duration of two years. The popular programmes offered at University of Kalyani are BTech and MBA. The university offers BTech specilisation in CSE, Electronics & Instrumentation, Information Technology, and others. After successful completion of the programmes, students can explore their career as Software Developers, Computer Engineers, Data Analyst, Systems Analysts, IT Consultants, etc
MBA is another popular programme. The university also offers a 2-year MBA programme at the PG level. MBA programme includes industry interactions, group presentations, field projects, case study analysis, and company visits to develop the practical skills of the students. Students can check the Kalyani University courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    Hi...University does not officially conduct dedicated campus placement drives specifically for MCA students. Many current and past students report that there is no structured placement cell or regular on-campus recruitment for MCA — especially compared to engineering or large tech colleges.Some information even suggests that on-campus placement activity for MCA has been minimal or non-existent, and students largely have to seek jobs or internships on their own.
faqs.question: Is kalyani university really arrange placement opportunities for MCA students?

faqs.answer: A:    Kalyani University was founded in 1960 by the Government of West Bengal.The university has 62 affiliated colleges under its aegis in the districts of Nadia and Murshidabad. Kalyani University is a NAAC 'A' Grade institute and is recognised by the UGC and AIU. BTech is among the most popular courses offered at the University. The duration of the course is of 4 years. Multiple internship & placement opportunities are offered to the students in both government & private sector. It is definitly worth doing BTech from Kalyani University.

review_summary.college_name: Kalyani University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and academic environment, but the infrastructure can be improved.

content.Placements: English Honours is not a placement-oriented course in our college, so the percentage of students getting formal campus placements is very low. Most students either prepare for competitive exams or take up private jobs on their own. On average, 10-15 percent of students get some kind of job opportunity through the college's career cell or seminars.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the English honours department is decent and improving every year. Our classrooms are simple but well-maintained with proper seating and ventilation. The library is one of the best parts because it has a good collection of English literature books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: University of Kalyani review.

content.Placements: Companies are not coming to this college. This is only a government college, and there is nothing for placement. We have to suffer from a scarcity of placements. If you want placement, then you have to go outside for the company, and you will have to reach out by yourself to get that placement.
content.Infrastructure: I would say the college is good, but the infrastructure is not as good. The lab is also not well-maintained. The library is very good because it is a university library. Hostel facilities are decent, but the food quality is very bad. This is a government-funded university, so you get what is provided in government schools.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in History - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My sweet college in Tehatta.

content.Placements: This is a well-known college in Nadia. Almost 80% students got placed in B.A. Honors in history. The average package varies from 3 LPA to 6 LPA. Various companies come to our college and select the best students for their companies. About 40% student gets an internship. Many students got selected as lecturers and assistant professors in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-designed, neat, and clean. There are CCTVs in almost all the classrooms. Digitally teaching equipment is also available. Everyone can get their necessary books related to their subjects in the library, which can help them. The hostel rooms are good. The food given in the hostel is hygienic. There are lots of opportunities in sports that students can avail themselves of.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Geography - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Not satisfied with the faculty.

content.Placements: The college itself doesn't provide any placement, but it conducts a lot of seminars related to placement, from which you can try to build a connection with the recruiter. The college, on its website, has an option for placement cell but whenever you try to contact them, they don't help.
content.Infrastructure: For geography, the infrastructure is not that good, the computer labs are not well structured, and the geography lab doesn't have all the instruments. The computer in the lab is not working properly. Teachers are very responsible for the curriculum of the course.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in History - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Won't suggest anyone to take admission in this college.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed is 70%. The lowest and the average packages are 1.20 LPA and 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Amazon, and Adani Green Energy. The percentage of students who got internships is about 12%, I don't know. The top role is surveyor.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are average. Labs and classrooms lack modern equipment. Wi-Fi is slow and unreliable. Sports facilities are poor and not well-maintained. I am very satisfied with this college. In this hot summer, there are just 4 fans in our classroom. We have a decent room.

paragraphs: The admission process of Kalyani University is inclusive of multiple steps such as registering on the official website or the website of the admission conducting body or exam. Followed by applications, students are required to go through the selection rounds.

After the selection rounds are over, course-wise counselling is conducted again by the admission conducting body or a final merit list is released by the university with the names of the shortlisted applicants. All these steps are mentioned below in detail:

STEP 1:Kalyani University Application Process 2026:For the courses offered by Kalyani University where admission is merit-based, applications can be completed online at the official website. Along with filling the application form, candidates are required to pay an application fee and submit the relevant documents on the admission portal.

STEP 2: Kalyani University Entrance Exams, Counselling and Other Selection Rounds:Followed by applications, students are required to go through the selection rounds. After the selection rounds are over, course-wise counselling is conducted again by the admission conducting body or a final merit list is released by the University with the names of the shortlisted applicants.

STEP 3: Kalyani University Merit List, Admission Offers and Seat Confirmation:After the completion of the selection rounds, course-wise counselling is conducted for the final seat allotment as per the intake capacity. The final merit list is released by the University with the names of the shortlisted applicants. Those interested in final admission can confirm their seat by paying for the admission fee.
Candidates who qualify for the Kalyani University admission process have to pay the fee for respective UG & PG courses.

Coming to affordability, it is among the causes of many people quitting college or their degree. Although the availability of student loans and scholarships has made education more affordable, qualifying for one of these loans or scholarships frequently comes with a set of requirements that must be met.
The details onKalyani University feesin addition to the average salary for the popular UG & PG courses are listed in the table below:
Note: *Candidates are requested to visit the official website to learn more about Kalayni University fees and seat intake in detail.

Also, the Kalyani University seat capacity varies as per the course type. TheBSc programmehas avery large numberof seats available for eligible students. To secure a seat at the university, a candidate should obtain a good score on the entrance test or in the qualifying examination (whichever is applicable). Check out the below table to know in detail about course-wise seat intake at Kalyani University:
Note: Candidates are requested to visit the official website to learn more about Kalyani University for seat intake in detail.

At Kalyani University, the reservation will be applicable as per the Government of West Bengal norms. ForPG programmes, there is an80% reservationin the seat intake for candidates who have graduated (Hons) in the respective subjects fromKalyani University.20% of seats are the candidates from other universities.
Note: The above information is taken from official sources.

faqs.question: Is B.Ed available at Kalyani University?

faqs.question: What is the admission process of Kalyani University?
faqs.answer: Kalyani University admissions are both merit and entrance-based for respective UG and PG courses. For a few UG courses such as B.Ed, BSc, MA, etc., admissions are offered based on candidates' merit scores obtained in their previous qualifying exam. Further, to get admission to courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA, etc., candidates have to qualify for state/ national-level entrance exams. As per the admission process, candidates also have to appear for other selection rounds such as Group Discussion and Personal Interview rounds for the respective courses. Later on, the selected students are allocated seats via a counselling process as per the seat capacity. Read more about the detailed University of Kalyani admission process 2023,here.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Kalyani University?
faqs.answer: Kalyani University admission to most of the courses are offered via scores of various state/ national-level entrance exams. However, the university does not conduct any entrance exams on its own, but it accepts a few state/ national-level entrances conducted by West Bengal state. These include WBJEE, WB JECA, WB JEMAT, CAT, MAT, GATE, etc., for admission to BTech, MCA, MBA and M.Tech programmes. For courses such as BCom, BA, BSc, MA, etc., direct admissions are offered to candidates based on their scores obtained in the previous qualifying exam. For more details on Kalyani University list of accepted entrance exams course-wise,check out this link.

placement_data.title: Kalyani University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The University has not released the placement report for the year 2025. However, NIRF report 2025 is available on the official website. As per the report, a total of 97 BTech students were placed during University of Kalyani placements 2024. The median package offered to BTech students was INR 6.96 LPA . Further, 240 PG (2-year) and 19 PG-Integrated students were placed during Kalyani University placements 2024. The median package for PG 2-year and PG integrated course stood at INR 9.30 LPA and INR 11 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: Which sector involves the largest share of University of Kalyani alumni?
faqs.answer: According to unofficial sources, a large share of the University of Kalyani alumni are working in the Education sector (19%), followed by Engineering (13%). The detailed sector-wise distribution of alumni is illustrated in the table below: Sector Percentage of Alumni Education 19% Engineering 13% Research 12% Operations 12% Business Development 11% Sales 11% Information Technology 10% Others 12% NOTE: The sectors involved in the ‘Others’ category are Administrative, Finance, Media and Communication, Arts and Design, Marketing, Customer Success and Support, Programme and Project Management, and HR.

faqs.question: How are the BSc placements at Kalyani University?
faqs.answer: Based on ‘Verified Students Reviews’ on Shiksha, BSc students of Kalyani University provide a mixed bag of reviews for BSc placements. Many reviews suggest that around 60% students get placed across different specialisations. According the reviews, the highest package stood at INR 9 LPA, while the lowest package offered was INR 3 lakhs. However, students suggest that some of the specialisations do not have many placement opportunities. Following are few quotes from verified Shiksha reviews: "92% of the students got placed. The highest package offered was INR 9 LPA, the average package was INR 6 LPA and, lowest package offered was INR 3 LPA" (BSc Hons in Geography- Batch of 2025) “The highest salary package offered was INR 8 LPA” (BSc- Batch of 2023) “Top roles offered are professors and other jobs in the health sector.” (BSc Hons in Physiology- Batch of 2025) “The average salary offered was INR 25,000 per month.” (Bachelor of Science (BSc Hons- Batch of 2023)

highlights.description: Consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies, Kalyani University is one of India’s top institutes. Recently, the institute ranked #51-100 in the NIRF 2025 under the State Public University category. The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The following article covers all the information around Kalyani University rankings:

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, Kalyani University has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'State Public University' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, Kalyani University's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
Kalyani University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, Kalyani University fell 200 ranks to #1001 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a decreasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Kalyani University fell 67 ranks to #330 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: Kalyani University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Krishnagar Government CollegeReviewed on 18 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and academic environment, but the infrastructure can be improved.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the English honours department is decent and improving every year. Our classrooms are simple but well-maintained with proper seating and ventilation. The library is one of the best parts because it has a good collection of English literature books.

reviews.review_heading: University of Kalyani review.
reviews.review_text: I would say the college is good, but the infrastructure is not as good. The lab is also not well-maintained. The library is very good because it is a university library. Hostel facilities are decent, but the food quality is very bad. This is a government-funded university, so you get what is provided in government schools.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Tehatta Government CollegeReviewed on 14 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My sweet college in Tehatta.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-designed, neat, and clean. There are CCTVs in almost all the classrooms. Digitally teaching equipment is also available. Everyone can get their necessary books related to their subjects in the library, which can help them. The hostel rooms are good. The food given in the hostel is hygienic. There are lots of opportunities in sports that students can avail themselves of.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Kalyani MahavidyalayaReviewed on 14 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: For geography, the infrastructure is not that good, the computer labs are not well structured, and the geography lab doesn't have all the instruments. The computer in the lab is not working properly. Teachers are very responsible for the curriculum of the course.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Kalyani MahavidyalayaReviewed on 11 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Won't suggest anyone to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average. Labs and classrooms lack modern equipment. Wi-Fi is slow and unreliable. Sports facilities are poor and not well-maintained. I am very satisfied with this college. In this hot summer, there are just 4 fans in our classroom. We have a decent room.

reviews.review_heading: It's a distinguished college because there are a lot of activities and fun.
reviews.review_text: The hostels, library, and instruments are all nicely maintained. The library room is fully air-conditioned, and the classrooms are under CCTV camera surveillance. All the safety and infrastructure are very good. There are nice canteens and a playing ground. Our course is very affordable for many students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 24 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Ranaghat College.
reviews.review_text: My college has Wi-Fi connection in the classrooms and library, which gives us many benefits. Our college has a canteen where good food is available. Our college has a medical facility. If something happens to someone, they are given medicine from there. Our college has a big field where we sometimes play sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 18 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well-developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs, and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained, and the environment is supportive of focused academic learning. The college fee is genuine.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 18 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well-developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs, and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained, and the environment is supportive of focused academic learning. The college fee is genuine.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 17 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs, and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained, and the environment is supportive of focused academic learning. The college fee is genuine.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 7 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is good in every aspect. I am happy to study at this college.
reviews.review_text: All the things are available in our college that are on your list. Our college has no hostal, so this is a bad thing. Our college should improve this thing so I request our faculty to create a new hostel for long distance students who study well, that's all I want in my school.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 7 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Why I prefer Ranaghat College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well-developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained. The environment is supportive of focused academic learning. A new building is under construction.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Karimpur Pannadevi CollegeReviewed on 5 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has outstanding faculty, great infrastructure and strong placements since 2015.
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure is well-maintained with high-speed Wi-Fi in classrooms, labs equipped with the latest tools, and a central library with a vast collection of books and digital resources. Hostels are clean and secure offering basic amenities. It also provides 24x7 water and electricity facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Kalyani MahavidyalayaReviewed on 2 Aug 2025)

paragraphs: Kalyani University MBA fee is INR 70,000, which is a total tuition fee for two years. Candidates have to pay a tuition fee amount of  INR 35,000 for one year. Apart from this, students also have to pay for other one-time fee components such as Admission Fee, Library Fee, Sports Fee, Registration Fee, Identity Card Fee, Immigration Fee and Students-aid Fund.
Note: The above fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Kalyani University MBA fees.

At Kalyani University, the total tuition fee for a two-year B.Ed course is INR 7,200. However, this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Kalyani University B.Ed fee. Additionally, candidates also have to pay for other one-time fee components such as Admission Fee, Library Fee, Sports Fee, Registration Fee, Identity Card Fee, Immigration Fee and Students-aid Fund.

The tuition fee for a four-year BTech course at Kalyani University is INR 1.44 lakh. This fee is common for all BTech specialisations. Additionally, candidates also have to pay for other one-time fee components such as Admission Fee, Library Fee, Sports Fee, Registration Fee, Identity Card Fee, Immigration Fee and Students-aid Fund.
Note: The above fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Kalyani University BTech fee.

Yes, Kalyani university provides scholarships and fee waiver schemes to extend it support to deserving BSc programme students. Each scholarship is different to cater to varying needs of students. The BSc programme students can avail Scholarship for Talent Support, Akyashree Scholarship for Minority Students, Swami Vivekananda Merit-Cum-Means Scholarship, etc.

overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at JSPM - TSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology are B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, JSPM - TSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology has a rating of 4 by students. The college's campus life, placements, faculty and infrastructure has been rated as 3.8, 4.2 and 4.2 as per reviews by students. overview_faqs.question: How is life at JSPM - TSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: PVPIT is governed by The Shetkari Shikshan Mandal, a charitable Trust registered under Bombay Public Trust Act 1950 and Societies Registration Act 1860.Academic environment and the overall campus life experience is really appreciable. Faculty teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable, which is very promising. The industry-focused curriculum is also a significant advantage. Furthermore, it have zero tolerance for ragging as well as JSPM-TSSM has taken all necessary steps to ensure the comfort of newcomers. The university aspires to build, cultivate, and maintain an environment of outstanding academic achievement, research, and entrepreneurship in order to prepare all aspiring students to address global concerns while keeping high ethical and moral standards through qualitative techniques.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses offered by JSPM - TSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: JSPM - TSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology is a well known Institute located in Pune, Maharashtra. It was established in 2006. The Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology (PVPIT) at JSPM-TSSM offers ten programmes with tuition ranging from Rs. 186,000 for the M.E. in Computer Engineering to Rs. 353,556 for the B.E. in Computer Engineering. Furthermore, B.Tech total tuition fees is 2.7L-3.5L while total tuition fees for pursuing M.Tech is 1.9L - 2.2L.
